name: Tyrannosaurus Rex
description: Tyrannosaurus rex was one of the largest land carnivores of all time. It lived during the late Cretaceous period and was an apex predator with powerful jaws and keen binocular vision.
descriptionZh: 霸王龙是有史以来最大的陆地食肉动物之一。它生活在白垩纪晚期，是顶级掠食者，拥有强大的颌骨和敏锐的双眼视觉。
facts: T. Rex could exert a bite force of over 12,800 pounds
Its tiny arms were actually very strong, capable of lifting about 430 pounds each
T. Rex had excellent binocular vision, better than modern hawks
factsZh: 霸王龙的咬合力超过12,800磅
它的小臂实际上非常强壮，每只可以举起约430磅
霸王龙拥有出色的双眼视觉，比现代鹰还要好

name: Triceratops
description: Triceratops is one of the most recognizable dinosaurs, known for its three horns and large bony frill. It was a herbivore that lived in the late Cretaceous period.
descriptionZh: 三角龙是最知名的恐龙之一，以其三只角和巨大的骨质颈盾闻名。它是白垩纪晚期的草食性恐龙。
facts: Triceratops had between 400 and 800 teeth arranged in groups called batteries
Its frill may have been used for temperature regulation and display
Triceratops fossils with T. Rex bite marks suggest epic battles between the two
factsZh: 三角龙有400到800颗排列成组的牙齿
它的颈盾可能用于调节体温和展示
带有霸王龙咬痕的三角龙化石表明两者曾有过激烈的战斗

name: Velociraptor
description: Velociraptor was a small but agile predator from the late Cretaceous period. Despite its Hollywood portrayal, it was actually about the size of a turkey and covered in feathers.
descriptionZh: 迅猛龙是白垩纪晚期一种体型较小但敏捷的掠食者。尽管电影中的形象很大，但实际上它只有火鸡大小，并且覆盖着羽毛。
facts: Velociraptor was covered in feathers, as evidenced by quill knobs on its arm bones
Its famous sickle-shaped claw was used to pin down prey, not slash it
A famous fossil shows a Velociraptor locked in combat with a Protoceratops
factsZh: 迅猛龙覆盖着羽毛，其臂骨上的羽根瘤提供了证据
它著名的镰刀形爪子是用来按住猎物的，而不是撕裂
一具著名化石展示了迅猛龙与原角龙搏斗的场景

name: Brachiosaurus
description: Brachiosaurus was a massive sauropod dinosaur known for its long neck and front legs that were longer than its hind legs, giving it a giraffe-like posture.
descriptionZh: 腕龙是一种巨大的蜥脚类恐龙，以其长颈和前肢比后肢更长的特征闻名，使其呈现类似长颈鹿的姿态。
facts: Brachiosaurus could reach vegetation up to 13 meters high
It needed to eat approximately 400 kg of plants every day
Unlike most dinosaurs, its front legs were longer than its back legs
factsZh: 腕龙能够够到13米高的植物
它每天需要吃大约400公斤的植物
与大多数恐龙不同，它的前肢比后肢更长

name: Stegosaurus
description: Stegosaurus is famous for the double row of kite-shaped plates along its back and the spiked tail known as a thagomizer. It lived during the late Jurassic period.
descriptionZh: 剑龙以其背部两排菱形骨板和带尖刺的尾巴（称为「尾钉」）而闻名。它生活在侏罗纪晚期。
facts: Its brain was only the size of a walnut, about 80 grams
The plates on its back were likely used for temperature regulation and display
The term 'thagomizer' for its tail spikes was coined from a Far Side cartoon
factsZh: 它的大脑只有核桃大小，约80克
背部的骨板可能用于调节体温和展示
「尾钉」这个术语来源于一幅漫画

name: Spinosaurus
description: Spinosaurus was the largest carnivorous dinosaur, even bigger than T. Rex. It had a distinctive sail on its back and was semi-aquatic, hunting fish in rivers.
descriptionZh: 棘龙是最大的肉食性恐龙，甚至比霸王龙更大。它背部有独特的帆状脊，是半水生动物，在河流中捕鱼。
facts: Spinosaurus is the only known semi-aquatic dinosaur
Its sail could be up to 2 meters tall
It had conical teeth similar to crocodiles, perfect for catching fish
factsZh: 棘龙是已知唯一的半水生恐龙
它的帆状脊可以高达2米
它有类似鳄鱼的圆锥形牙齿，非常适合捕鱼

name: Pteranodon
description: Pteranodon was a large flying reptile (pterosaur) from the late Cretaceous. While not technically a dinosaur, it was one of the most iconic prehistoric creatures.
descriptionZh: 无齿翼龙是白垩纪晚期一种大型飞行爬行动物（翼龙）。虽然严格来说不是恐龙，但它是最具代表性的史前生物之一。
facts: Pteranodon had a wingspan of up to 7 meters
Despite its size, it only weighed about 25 kg due to hollow bones
It had no teeth - its name literally means 'wing without tooth'
factsZh: 无齿翼龙的翼展可达7米
尽管体型大，由于空心骨骼它只重约25公斤
它没有牙齿——名字的意思就是「没有牙齿的翅膀」

name: Ankylosaurus
description: Ankylosaurus was a heavily armored dinosaur with a massive club-shaped tail. Its body was covered in thick bony plates called osteoderms for protection.
descriptionZh: 甲龙是一种全身披甲的恐龙，拥有巨大的锤状尾巴。它的身体覆盖着厚实的骨板（称为皮内成骨）以提供保护。
facts: Its tail club could generate enough force to break bones
Even its eyelids had bony armor plates
Ankylosaurus was one of the last dinosaurs to go extinct
factsZh: 它的尾锤可以产生足以粉碎骨头的力量
甚至它的眼皮上都有骨质甲片
甲龙是最后灭绝的恐龙之一

name: Parasaurolophus
description: Parasaurolophus is known for its distinctive elongated, backward-curving cranial crest. It was a duck-billed dinosaur (hadrosaur) that could walk on two or four legs.
descriptionZh: 副栉龙以其独特的向后弯曲的头冠闻名。它是一种鸭嘴龙（鸭嘴龙科），可以用两条腿或四条腿行走。
facts: Its crest was hollow and could have been used to make sounds like a trumpet
Scientists believe it could produce sounds at frequencies between 30-240 Hz
It could run at speeds up to 40 km/h to escape predators
factsZh: 它的头冠是空心的，可能像喇叭一样发出声音
科学家认为它能产生30-240赫兹的声音
它可以以高达40公里/小时的速度奔跑来逃避捕食者

name: Dilophosaurus
description: Dilophosaurus was one of the first large predatory dinosaurs. It had two distinctive parallel crests on its skull. Contrary to the movie Jurassic Park, it did not spit venom or have a frill.
descriptionZh: 双冠龙是最早的大型掠食性恐龙之一。它的头骨上有两个平行的独特冠饰。与电影《侏罗纪公园》不同，它不会喷毒也没有颈部皱褶。
facts: Dilophosaurus did NOT have a frill or spit venom as shown in Jurassic Park
Its twin crests were too fragile for combat, likely used for display
It was one of the largest predators of the early Jurassic period
factsZh: 双冠龙没有颈褶也不会喷毒，这些是《侏罗纪公园》的虚构
它的双冠太脆弱不能用于战斗，可能用于展示
它是侏罗纪早期最大的掠食者之一

name: Diplodocus
description: Diplodocus was one of the longest dinosaurs ever discovered. It had a remarkably long neck and an even longer whip-like tail that it may have used for defense.
descriptionZh: 梁龙是有史以来发现的最长的恐龙之一。它有极长的脖子和更长的鞭状尾巴，可能用于防御。
facts: Its tail could crack like a whip, possibly producing a sonic boom
Diplodocus could not raise its neck much above shoulder height
It replaced its pencil-shaped teeth about once a month
factsZh: 它的尾巴可以像鞭子一样甩出，可能产生音爆
梁龙不能把脖子抬得比肩膀高太多
它的铅笔形牙齿大约每月更换一次

name: Allosaurus
description: Allosaurus was the apex predator of the late Jurassic period. It was a large, bipedal carnivore with powerful forelimbs and a large skull filled with serrated teeth.
descriptionZh: 异特龙是侏罗纪晚期的顶级掠食者。它是大型两足行走的肉食动物，拥有强壮的前肢和充满锯齿状牙齿的大型头骨。
facts: Allosaurus may have hunted in packs to take down large sauropods
It could open its jaws extremely wide, like a snake
It was the most common large predator in North America 150 million years ago
factsZh: 异特龙可能成群狩猎来捕杀大型蜥脚类恐龙
它可以像蛇一样极度张开下颚
它是1.5亿年前北美洲最常见的大型掠食者

name: Pachycephalosaurus
description: Pachycephalosaurus is known for its remarkably thick skull dome, which could be up to 25 cm thick. It is debated whether this dome was used for head-butting.
descriptionZh: 厚头龙以其非常厚的穹顶状头骨闻名，厚度可达25厘米。关于这个头冠是否用于头对头碰撞，科学界仍在争论。
facts: Its skull dome was up to 25 cm (10 inches) thick
Recent studies suggest head-butting would have caused brain damage
It may have used its dome for flank-butting instead, like modern bighorn sheep
factsZh: 它的头骨穹顶厚达25厘米
最新研究表明头对头碰撞会造成脑损伤
它可能像现代大角羊一样用头顶撞击侧面

name: Archaeopteryx
description: Archaeopteryx is often considered the earliest known bird and a transitional fossil between dinosaurs and modern birds. It had feathered wings but also teeth and a bony tail.
descriptionZh: 始祖鸟通常被认为是已知最早的鸟类，也是恐龙与现代鸟类之间的过渡化石。它有羽毛翅膀，但也有牙齿和骨质尾巴。
facts: It bridges the evolutionary gap between non-avian dinosaurs and birds
Only about 12 fossil specimens have ever been found
It had flight feathers similar to modern birds but also clawed fingers
factsZh: 它填补了非鸟恐龙和鸟类之间的进化空白
目前只发现了约12个化石标本
它有类似现代鸟类的飞行羽毛，但也有带爪的手指

name: Iguanodon
description: Iguanodon was one of the first dinosaurs ever scientifically described. It was a large herbivore that could walk on both two and four legs, and had distinctive thumb spikes.
descriptionZh: 禽龙是最早被科学描述的恐龙之一。它是一种大型草食动物，可以两足或四足行走，并有独特的拇指尖刺。
facts: It was one of the first three dinosaurs formally named (1825)
Its thumb spike was originally mistaken for a horn on its nose
Over 30 complete skeletons were found in a Belgian coal mine in 1878
factsZh: 它是最早被正式命名的三种恐龙之一（1825年）
它的拇指尖刺最初被误认为是鼻子上的角
1878年在比利时的一个煤矿中发现了超过30具完整骨架

name: Coelophysis
description: Coelophysis was one of the earliest dinosaurs, a small and swift predator from the late Triassic period. Hundreds of specimens were found together at Ghost Ranch, New Mexico.
descriptionZh: 腔骨龙是最早期的恐龙之一，是三叠纪晚期一种小型而敏捷的掠食者。在新墨西哥州的幽灵牧场发现了数百具化石标本。
facts: Hundreds of Coelophysis fossils were found at Ghost Ranch, suggesting pack behavior
It was one of the first dinosaurs to appear in the fossil record
A Coelophysis skull was taken into space aboard the Space Shuttle Endeavour in 1998
factsZh: 在幽灵牧场发现了数百具化石，表明它们有群居行为
它是化石记录中最早出现的恐龙之一
1998年一个腔骨龙头骨被带上了奋进号航天飞机

name: Plateosaurus
description: Plateosaurus was one of the first large herbivorous dinosaurs. It was a prosauropod from the late Triassic and an ancestor of the giant sauropods.
descriptionZh: 板龙是最早的大型草食性恐龙之一。它是三叠纪晚期的原蜥脚类，是巨型蜥脚类恐龙的祖先。
facts: Plateosaurus is one of the most well-known Triassic dinosaurs with over 100 specimens
It could rear up on its hind legs to reach high vegetation
It is one of the earliest dinosaurs discovered in Europe
factsZh: 板龙是最知名的三叠纪恐龙之一，已发现超过100具标本
它可以用后腿站立来够到高处的植物
它是欧洲最早发现的恐龙之一

name: Mosasaurus
description: Mosasaurus was a giant marine reptile, not a dinosaur, that dominated the seas during the late Cretaceous. It was an apex ocean predator with powerful jaws.
descriptionZh: 沧龙是一种巨大的海洋爬行动物，严格来说不是恐龙，但在白垩纪晚期统治着海洋。它是顶级海洋掠食者，拥有强大的颌骨。
facts: Mosasaurus could grow up to 17 meters long
It had a double-hinged jaw, allowing it to swallow prey almost whole
It was actually more closely related to modern monitor lizards than to dinosaurs
factsZh: 沧龙可以长到17米长
它有双铰链式的下颚，可以几乎整个吞下猎物
它实际上与现代巨蜥的亲缘关系比恐龙更近

name: Carnotaurus
description: Carnotaurus was a unique predatory dinosaur with distinctive bull-like horns above its eyes. It had extremely reduced arms, even smaller than those of T. Rex.
descriptionZh: 食肉牛龙是一种独特的掠食性恐龙，眼睛上方有明显的牛角状角。它的前肢极度退化，甚至比霸王龙的还小。
facts: Its name means 'meat-eating bull' due to its horn-like projections
It may have been one of the fastest large predatory dinosaurs, reaching 48-56 km/h
Its arms were so tiny they couldn't even reach its mouth
factsZh: 它的名字意为「食肉牛」，因为头上有角状突起
它可能是最快的大型掠食恐龙之一，速度可达48-56公里/小时
它的手臂太小了，甚至无法触及自己的嘴巴

name: Giganotosaurus
description: Giganotosaurus was one of the largest known terrestrial carnivores, rivaling T. Rex in size. It lived in South America during the late Cretaceous period.
descriptionZh: 南方巨兽龙是已知最大的陆地肉食动物之一，体型可与霸王龙匹敌。它生活在白垩纪晚期的南美洲。
facts: Its skull was longer than T. Rex's at about 1.8 meters
Despite its size, its brain was only about half the size of T. Rex's
It may have hunted the massive titanosaur Argentinosaurus in packs
factsZh: 它的头骨比霸王龙还长，约1.8米
尽管体型庞大，它的大脑只有霸王龙的一半大小
它可能成群猎杀巨型泰坦龙——阿根廷龙

name: Herrerasaurus
description: Herrerasaurus was one of the earliest dinosaurs, a bipedal predator from the Late Triassic of Argentina. It had sharp, curved teeth and grasping hands.
descriptionZh: 埃雷拉龙是最早的恐龙之一，是来自阿根廷晚三叠世的双足掠食者。它有锋利的弯曲牙齿和抓握能力强的前肢。
facts: One of the oldest known dinosaurs
Had a flexible lower jaw joint unique among dinosaurs
Found in the Ischigualasto Formation, known as 'Valley of the Moon'
factsZh: 已知最古老的恐龙之一
拥有恐龙中独特的灵活下颌关节
发现于伊斯基瓜拉斯托组，被称为「月亮谷」

name: Eoraptor
description: Eoraptor was a small, lightweight dinosaur from the Late Triassic. It is one of the earliest known dinosaurs and may be close to the common ancestor of all dinosaurs.
descriptionZh: 始盗龙是来自晚三叠世的一种体型小巧轻盈的恐龙。它是已知最早的恐龙之一，可能接近所有恐龙的共同祖先。
facts: Only about 1 meter long, roughly the size of a fox
Had both leaf-shaped and curved teeth, suggesting an omnivorous diet
Discovered in the same formation as Herrerasaurus
factsZh: 体长仅约1米，大约是狐狸的大小
同时拥有叶形和弯曲牙齿，表明它是杂食性的
与埃雷拉龙在同一地层被发现

name: Postosuchus
description: Postosuchus was a large Triassic reptile and apex predator. Though not a dinosaur, it was closely related and dominated its ecosystem before dinosaurs rose to prominence.
descriptionZh: 波斯特鳄是三叠纪的大型爬行动物和顶级掠食者。虽然不是恐龙，但与恐龙关系密切，在恐龙崛起之前统治着生态系统。
facts: One of the top predators before dinosaurs took over
Could possibly walk on two legs despite being a rauisuchid
Its skull had serrated teeth similar to those of later theropods
factsZh: 在恐龙称霸之前的顶级掠食者之一
尽管是劳氏鳄类，但可能可以用两条腿行走
其头骨有类似于后来兽脚类恐龙的锯齿状牙齿

name: Liliensternus
description: Liliensternus was one of the largest carnivorous dinosaurs of the Late Triassic in Europe. It was a swift bipedal predator with elongated legs.
descriptionZh: 理理恩龙是欧洲晚三叠世最大的食肉恐龙之一。它是一种敏捷的双足掠食者，拥有修长的腿部。
facts: One of the largest predators of its time in Europe
Named after Dr. Hugo Ruhle von Lilienstern
Lived near the end of the Triassic period
factsZh: 当时欧洲最大的掠食者之一
以Hugo Ruhle von Lilienstern博士的名字命名
生活在三叠纪末期

name: Pisanosaurus
description: Pisanosaurus is possibly the oldest known ornithischian dinosaur. It was a small herbivore from the Late Triassic of Argentina.
descriptionZh: 皮萨诺龙可能是已知最古老的鸟臀目恐龙。它是来自阿根廷晚三叠世的小型草食恐龙。
facts: May be the oldest ornithischian dinosaur ever found
Only known from fragmentary remains
Lived alongside other early dinosaurs like Herrerasaurus
factsZh: 可能是迄今发现的最古老的鸟臀目恐龙
仅从零散的化石碎片中被发现
与埃雷拉龙等其他早期恐龙共同生活

name: Procompsognathus
description: Procompsognathus was a small theropod dinosaur from the Late Triassic of Germany. Despite its small size, it was an agile predator.
descriptionZh: 原美颌龙是来自德国晚三叠世的小型兽脚类恐龙。尽管体型小巧，但它是一种敏捷的掠食者。
facts: Featured in the Jurassic Park novel
One of the smallest known Triassic dinosaurs
May have hunted insects and small lizards
factsZh: 出现在「侏罗纪公园」小说中
已知最小的三叠纪恐龙之一
可能以昆虫和小蜥蜴为食

name: Mussaurus
description: Mussaurus was a sauropodomorph dinosaur from the Late Triassic. Its name means 'mouse lizard' because the first fossils found were tiny juveniles.
descriptionZh: 鼠龙是晚三叠世的蜥脚形亚目恐龙。它的名字意为「鼠蜥蜴」，因为最初发现的化石是微小的幼体。
facts: Baby fossils were so tiny they could fit in a human hand
Adults grew to over 6 meters long
Lived in herds, as shown by mass fossil assemblages
factsZh: 幼体化石小到可以放在人的手掌中
成体可以长到6米以上
群居生活，大量化石聚集证明了这一点

name: Riojasaurus
description: Riojasaurus was a large sauropodomorph from the Late Triassic. It was one of the first large herbivorous dinosaurs, foreshadowing the giant sauropods.
descriptionZh: 里奥哈龙是晚三叠世的大型蜥脚形亚目恐龙。它是最早的大型草食恐龙之一，预示了巨型蜥脚类恐龙的出现。
facts: One of the largest Triassic dinosaurs at 10 meters long
Unlike later sauropods, it could not rear up on its hind legs
Its dense bones suggest it was a slow-moving animal
factsZh: 体长10米，是三叠纪最大的恐龙之一
与后来的蜥脚类不同，它无法用后腿站立
密实的骨骼表明它是一种行动缓慢的动物

name: Compsognathus
description: Compsognathus was one of the smallest known non-avian dinosaurs, about the size of a turkey. It was a swift bipedal predator from the Late Jurassic.
descriptionZh: 美颌龙是已知最小的非鸟类恐龙之一，大约相当于一只火鸡的大小。它是侏罗纪晚期的敏捷双足掠食者。
facts: One of the smallest known dinosaurs
A preserved specimen contained the remains of a lizard in its stomach
Featured in the Jurassic Park films
factsZh: 已知最小的恐龙之一
一具保存完好的标本胃中含有蜥蜴残骸
出现在「侏罗纪公园」系列电影中

name: Ceratosaurus
description: Ceratosaurus was a large predatory dinosaur from the Late Jurassic. It had a prominent horn on its snout and a row of small osteoderms along its back.
descriptionZh: 角鼻龙是侏罗纪晚期的大型掠食性恐龙。它的鼻子上有一个突出的角，背部有一排小骨板。
facts: Had a distinctive nasal horn, possibly used for display
Coexisted with Allosaurus but hunted different prey
Had deeper, more flexible tail than other theropods
factsZh: 拥有独特的鼻角，可能用于展示
与异特龙共存但捕猎不同的猎物
比其他兽脚类恐龙拥有更深、更灵活的尾巴

name: Apatosaurus
description: Apatosaurus was a large sauropod dinosaur from the Late Jurassic. Once confused with Brontosaurus, it was one of the largest land animals of its time.
descriptionZh: 迷惑龙是侏罗纪晚期的大型蜥脚类恐龙。曾与雷龙混淆，它是当时最大的陆地动物之一。
facts: Once known as Brontosaurus due to a naming mix-up
Could whip its tail at supersonic speeds as a defense mechanism
Had a tiny head relative to its massive body
factsZh: 曾因命名混淆被称为雷龙
可以将尾巴甩出超音速作为防御手段
相对于巨大的身体，头部非常小

name: Kentrosaurus
description: Kentrosaurus was a stegosaurid dinosaur from the Late Jurassic of Tanzania. It had both plates and spikes along its back and tail.
descriptionZh: 钉状龙是坦桑尼亚侏罗纪晚期的剑龙科恐龙。它的背部和尾部同时分布着骨板和尖刺。
facts: Had pairs of spikes on its tail for defense
Smaller than its famous relative Stegosaurus
One of the best-known African dinosaurs
factsZh: 尾部有成对的尖刺用于防御
比它的近亲剑龙体型更小
最著名的非洲恐龙之一

name: Camarasaurus
description: Camarasaurus was the most common sauropod in Late Jurassic North America. Its name means 'chambered lizard' referring to the hollow chambers in its vertebrae.
descriptionZh: 圆顶龙是北美侏罗纪晚期最常见的蜥脚类恐龙。其名字意为「有腔室的蜥蜴」，指的是椎骨中的空腔。
facts: The most commonly found sauropod in North America
Had spoon-shaped teeth adapted for tough vegetation
Hollow vertebrae reduced its weight without reducing strength
factsZh: 北美洲最常见的蜥脚类恐龙
拥有适合咀嚼坚硬植物的汤匙形牙齿
空心椎骨在不减少强度的情况下减轻了体重

name: Megalosaurus
description: Megalosaurus was the first dinosaur to be formally named and described. It was a large theropod from the Middle Jurassic of England.
descriptionZh: 斑龙是第一种被正式命名和描述的恐龙。它是英格兰中侏罗世的大型兽脚类恐龙。
facts: The very first dinosaur to be scientifically named in 1824
Originally thought to walk on four legs like a giant lizard
Its jaw bone was first described as belonging to a giant human
factsZh: 1824年第一种被科学命名的恐龙
最初被认为像巨型蜥蜴一样用四条腿行走
其颌骨最初被认为属于巨人

name: Dryosaurus
description: Dryosaurus was a small, fast-running ornithopod from the Late Jurassic. It relied on speed to escape predators rather than armor or size.
descriptionZh: 橡树龙是侏罗纪晚期的小型快速鸟脚类恐龙。它依靠速度而非装甲或体型来逃避掠食者。
facts: One of the fastest dinosaurs of the Jurassic
Had a beak for cropping vegetation
Lived alongside giants like Brachiosaurus and Allosaurus
factsZh: 侏罗纪最快的恐龙之一
有用于啃食植物的喙
与腕龙和异特龙等巨型恐龙共同生活

name: Yangchuanosaurus
description: Yangchuanosaurus was a large theropod from the Middle Jurassic of China. It was the apex predator of its ecosystem in what is now Sichuan province.
descriptionZh: 永川龙是中国中侏罗世的大型兽脚类恐龙。它是现在四川省一带生态系统中的顶级掠食者。
facts: The largest predator found in the Dashanpu Formation
Named after Yongchuan in Sichuan, China
Had crests and bumps on its skull for display
factsZh: 大山铺恐龙化石群中发现的最大掠食者
以四川永川命名
头骨上有脊和突起用于展示

name: Mamenchisaurus
description: Mamenchisaurus was a sauropod with the longest neck of any known dinosaur. Its neck could reach up to 15 meters, nearly half of its total body length.
descriptionZh: 马门溪龙是已知颈部最长的蜥脚类恐龙。它的脖子可达15米，几乎占全身长度的一半。
facts: Had the longest neck of any known dinosaur at up to 15 meters
Its neck had 19 vertebrae, more than any other sauropod
Named after the Mamenchi Ferry in Sichuan, China
factsZh: 拥有已知恐龙中最长的颈部，可达15米
颈部有19节椎骨，比任何其他蜥脚类都多
以四川马门溪渡口命名

name: Deinonychus
description: Deinonychus was an agile dromaeosaurid known for its large, sickle-shaped claw on each hindfoot. Its discovery revolutionized scientific thinking about dinosaurs.
descriptionZh: 恐爪龙是一种敏捷的驰龙科恐龙，以每只后足上巨大的镰刀状爪闻名。它的发现彻底改变了科学界对恐龙的认知。
facts: Its name means 'terrible claw'
Inspired the raptors in Jurassic Park
Its discovery led to the 'dinosaur renaissance' in paleontology
factsZh: 名字意为「恐怖之爪」
「侏罗纪公园」中迅猛龙的灵感来源
它的发现引发了古生物学的「恐龙复兴」

name: Edmontosaurus
description: Edmontosaurus was one of the largest hadrosaurids. It had a broad, flat beak and hundreds of tightly packed teeth for grinding tough vegetation.
descriptionZh: 埃德蒙顿龙是最大的鸭嘴龙科恐龙之一。它有宽阔扁平的喙和数百颗紧密排列的牙齿，用于研磨坚硬的植物。
facts: Had up to 1,000 teeth for chewing tough plants
Some specimens preserve skin impressions
Lived alongside T. Rex and may have been its prey
factsZh: 拥有多达1000颗牙齿用于咀嚼坚硬植物
一些标本保存了皮肤印痕
与霸王龙同时代生活，可能是其猎物

name: Oviraptor
description: Oviraptor's name means 'egg thief', but it was likely protecting its own nest when discovered. It had a distinctive crest on its head and a toothless beak.
descriptionZh: 窃蛋龙的名字意为「偷蛋贼」，但它被发现时可能是在保护自己的巢穴。它头上有独特的头冠和无齿的喙。
facts: Wrongly named 'egg thief' - it was actually protecting its own eggs
Had a parrot-like beak and possibly a head crest
May have had feathers covering its body
factsZh: 被错误命名为「偷蛋贼」——实际上是在保护自己的蛋
拥有类似鹦鹉的喙和可能的头冠
身体可能覆盖着羽毛

name: Therizinosaurus
description: Therizinosaurus had the longest claws of any known animal, reaching up to 1 meter long. Despite its fearsome appearance, it was likely a herbivore.
descriptionZh: 镰刀龙拥有已知动物中最长的爪子，长达1米。尽管外表凶猛，但它很可能是草食性的。
facts: Had the longest claws of any known animal at up to 1 meter
Despite being a theropod, it was a herbivore
Its name means 'scythe lizard' referring to its massive claws
factsZh: 拥有已知动物中最长的爪子，长达1米
尽管属于兽脚类，但它是草食性的
名字意为「镰刀蜥蜴」，指的是其巨大的爪子

name: Gallimimus
description: Gallimimus was one of the largest ornithomimosaurs. It had a long neck, toothless beak, and long legs built for speed.
descriptionZh: 似鸡龙是最大的似鸟龙类之一。它有长颈、无齿的喙和为速度而生的长腿。
facts: Could run up to 70 km/h, among the fastest dinosaurs
Its name means 'chicken mimic'
Featured in the stampede scene in Jurassic Park
factsZh: 奔跑速度可达70公里/小时，是最快的恐龙之一
名字意为「鸡的模仿者」
出现在「侏罗纪公园」的恐龙群奔场景中

name: Styracosaurus
description: Styracosaurus was a ceratopsian dinosaur known for the dramatic array of horns protruding from its frill. It had one large nose horn and at least four long frill spikes.
descriptionZh: 戟龙是以颈盾上的壮观角阵闻名的角龙科恐龙。它有一个大鼻角和至少四根长颈盾尖刺。
facts: Had at least 4 long spikes on its frill plus a large nose horn
Likely lived in herds for protection
Its elaborate frill may have been used for species recognition
factsZh: 颈盾上至少有4根长刺，还有一根大鼻角
可能群居以获得保护
精致的颈盾可能用于物种识别

name: Protoceratops
description: Protoceratops was a small ceratopsian dinosaur from Mongolia. Famous for being found in a 'fighting dinosaurs' fossil locked in combat with Velociraptor.
descriptionZh: 原角龙是来自蒙古的小型角龙科恐龙。因与迅猛龙搏斗的「格斗恐龙」化石而闻名。
facts: The famous 'Fighting Dinosaurs' fossil shows it locked in combat with a Velociraptor
Laid eggs in circular nests
May have inspired the legendary griffin of Central Asian mythology
factsZh: 著名的「格斗恐龙」化石展示了它与迅猛龙的搏斗
在环形巢穴中产蛋
可能启发了中亚神话中的狮鹫传说

name: Corythosaurus
description: Corythosaurus was a duck-billed dinosaur with a distinctive helmet-shaped crest on its head, likely used to amplify sounds for communication.
descriptionZh: 冠龙是一种头部有独特头盔形头冠的鸭嘴龙，可能用于放大声音进行交流。
facts: Its crest was hollow and may have functioned like a resonating chamber
Could produce low-frequency sounds for communication
Some specimens preserve skin with scale patterns
factsZh: 其头冠是空心的，可能像共鸣腔一样发挥作用
可以发出低频声音进行交流
一些标本保存了带有鳞片图案的皮肤

name: Majungasaurus
description: Majungasaurus was the apex predator of Cretaceous Madagascar. It is one of the few dinosaurs with evidence of cannibalism.
descriptionZh: 玛君龙是白垩纪马达加斯加的顶级掠食者。它是少数有同类相食证据的恐龙之一。
facts: Tooth marks on its own species' bones prove cannibalism
Had a single horn-like bump on top of its skull
Was the top predator on the island of Madagascar
factsZh: 在同类骨骼上的齿痕证明了同类相食
头骨顶部有一个类似角的突起
是马达加斯加岛上的顶级掠食者

name: Microraptor
description: Microraptor was a small, four-winged dinosaur that could glide between trees. It provides key evidence for the evolution of flight in dinosaurs.
descriptionZh: 小盗龙是一种拥有四翼的小型恐龙，能在树间滑翔。它为恐龙飞行演化提供了关键证据。
facts: Had four wings - feathered arms AND legs
Could glide from tree to tree
Fossils show iridescent black plumage, like a modern crow
factsZh: 拥有四翼——前肢和后肢都有羽毛
可以在树木之间滑翔
化石显示有虹彩黑色羽毛，像现代乌鸦

name: Sinoceratops
description: Sinoceratops is the first ceratopsid dinosaur discovered in China. It had a large nose horn and a unique frill with forward-curving hornlets.
descriptionZh: 中国角龙是中国发现的第一种角龙科恐龙。它有大鼻角和独特的前曲小角颈盾。
facts: The first ceratopsid ever found in China
Featured in the Jurassic World: Fallen Kingdom movie
Had unique forward-curving hornlets on its frill
factsZh: 中国发现的第一种角龙科恐龙
出现在电影「侏罗纪世界2：殒落国度」中
颈盾上有独特的前曲小角

name: Plesiosaurus
description: Plesiosaurus was a marine reptile with a long neck, small head, and four flippers. Though not a dinosaur, it lived during the Mesozoic era.
descriptionZh: 蛇颈龙是一种长颈、小头、四鳍的海生爬行动物。虽然不是恐龙，但它生活在中生代。
facts: Its body plan inspired the legend of the Loch Ness Monster
Had four powerful flippers for underwater 'flying'
First discovered by Mary Anning in 1823
factsZh: 其体型启发了尼斯湖水怪的传说
四个强有力的鳍足可以在水下「飞行」
1823年由Mary Anning首次发现

name: Quetzalcoatlus
description: Quetzalcoatlus was one of the largest flying animals ever. With a wingspan of 10-11 meters, it was as large as a small airplane.
descriptionZh: 风神翼龙是有史以来最大的飞行动物之一。翼展10-11米，和一架小型飞机一样大。
facts: Wingspan of up to 11 meters, the size of a small airplane
Named after the Aztec feathered serpent god Quetzalcoatl
Standing on the ground, it was as tall as a giraffe
factsZh: 翼展可达11米，相当于一架小型飞机
以阿兹特克羽蛇神命名
站在地面上时，和长颈鹿一样高

name: Aardonyx
description: Aardonyx is a genus of basal sauropodomorph dinosaur. It is known from the type species Aardonyx celestae found from the Early Jurassic Elliot Formation of South Africa. A. celestae was named after Celeste Yates, who prepared much of the first known fossil material of the species. It has arm features that are intermediate between basal sauropodomorphs and more derived sauropods.
descriptionZh: 地爪龍屬 是近蜥龙类恐龍的一屬，化石發現於南非的艾略特組，年代為侏羅紀早期。地爪龍的前肢有許多介於原蜥腳類、蜥腳類恐龍的特徵。

name: Abavornis
description: Abavornis is the name given to a genus of primitive birds from the Late Cretaceous, containing the single species A. bonaparti. It was probably a member of the Enantiornithes, but as it is only known from a single broken coracoid, which, however, looks typically enantiornithine, that assignment is tentative. The fossil is from Late Cretaceous Bissekty Formation in the Kyzylkum, Uzbekistan. Another partial coracoid is very similar and is referred to as Abavornis sp.; it might belong to A. bonapar
descriptionZh: Abavornis是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Abdarainurus
description: Abdarainurus is a genus of titanosaur dinosaur from the Alagteeg Formation in Mongolia. The type and only species is A. barsboldi. Currently seen as an indeterminate titanosaur, it may represent a previously unknown lineage of Asian macronarians. Abdarainurus is not known from many remains; it is only known from eight front tail vertebrae and a middle tail vertebra and several chevrons.
descriptionZh: 阿布達林尾龍 是一屬泰坦巨龍類的蜥腳下目恐龍，化石發現於蒙古的阿拉提格組。牠的化石非常少，只有八個前段尾椎、一個中段尾椎和一些人字骨。模式種兼唯一種是巴氏阿布達林尾龍。目前被視為泰坦巨龍類的分類未定屬，很可能代表了一支過去未曾知曉的亞洲大鼻龍類演化支。

name: Abditosaurus
description: Abditosaurus is an extinct genus of titanosaurian sauropod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous (Maastrichtian) Conques Formation of Catalonia, Spain. The genus contains a single species, Abditosaurus kuehnei, known from a partial specimen representing the most complete titanosaur skeleton found in Europe. Phylogenetic analyses recover it within a clade of South American and African saltasaurines, distinct from other insular dwarf sauropods from the European archipelago. Abditosaurus inhabited the
descriptionZh: 匿踪龙 是西班牙加泰罗尼亚晚白垩世（马斯特里赫特阶）特伦普群一属已灭绝的泰坦巨龙类蜥脚下目恐龙，模式种兼唯一种是库氏匿踪龙。系统发育分析发现其处于一个由南美和非洲萨尔塔龙亚科构成的演化支中，与欧洲群岛上其它岛屿侏儒化的蜥脚类不同。匿踪龙生存于伊比利亚－阿莫里克岛 ――由当今西班牙、葡萄牙及法国南部组成的中生代岛屿上，并且是其生存环境中体型最大的泰坦巨龙类物种。

name: Abelichnus
description: Abelichnus is an extinct ichnogenus of dinosaur footprint from the Candeleros Formation and the Rio Limay Formation. The type ichnospecies, Abelichnus astigerrae, was first discovered in Argentina in 1987 and was recorded as the biggest known dinosaur footprint ever discovered. Abelichnus probably grew to a size of 12.5-13 meters long.
descriptionZh: Abelichnus是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Abelisaurus
description: Abelisaurus is a genus of predatory abelisaurid theropod dinosaur which lived during the Late Cretaceous Period (Campanian) of what is now South America. It was a bipedal carnivore that probably reached about 7.4 metres in length, although this is uncertain as it is known from only one partial skull.
descriptionZh: 阿貝力龍屬 又名亞伯龍，是阿貝力龍科恐龍的一屬，生活在白堊紀（坎帕階早期）的南美洲。牠是兩足的肉食性恐龍，雖然只有一個部份頭顱骨標本，但身長被估計可達7-9米。

name: Aberratiodontus
description: Yanornis is an extinct genus of fish-eating Early Cretaceous birds. Two species have been described, both from Liaoning province, China: Yanornis martini, based on several fossils found in the 120-million-year-old Jiufotang Formation at Chaoyang, and Yanornis guozhangi, from the 124-million-year-old Yixian Formation.
descriptionZh: Aberratiodontus是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Abitusavis
description: Abitusavis is an extinct genus of ornithuromorph dinosaurs from the Early Cretaceous Yixian Formation of China. The genus contains a single species, Abitusavis lii, known from a nearly complete skeleton.
descriptionZh: 别鸟 是今鸟形类恐龙已灭绝的一个属，来自中国早白垩世义县组。属下包括单一物种李氏别鸟，所知于一副几乎完整的骨骼。

name: Abrictosaurus
description: Abrictosaurus is a genus of heterodontosaurid dinosaur that lived during the Early Jurassic in what is now in parts of southern Africa such as Lesotho and South Africa. It was a bipedal herbivore or omnivore and was one of the most basal heterodontosaurids. It was approximately 1.2 metres (3.9 ft) long and weighed less than 45 kilograms (99 lb).
descriptionZh: 醒龍屬 意為「不眠的蜥蜴」，是畸齒龍科恐龍的一屬，生存於早侏儸紀的南部非洲。醒龍是種小型、二足、草食性或雜食性的恐龍，身長接近1.2公尺，重量少於45公斤。

name: Abrosaurus
description: Abrosaurus is a genus of macronarian sauropod dinosaur from the Middle Jurassic Period of what is now Asia. It is one of many dinosaurs found at the Dashanpu Quarry in the Sichuan Province of China. Like most sauropods, Abrosaurus was a quadrupedal herbivore. It was rather small for a sauropod, measuring no more than 9.1 metres (30 ft) long. Its head was boxy and topped with a tall, bony arch containing the nostrils. The generic name refers to the nature of the skull, with large openings separat
descriptionZh: 文雅龍屬 又名秀龍，是大鼻龍類恐龍的一個屬，生活在中侏羅世，化石是在中國四川省的大山鋪地層發現的。牠的名字來自古希臘語的「αβρος」和「σαυρος」，意即「精緻的蜥蜴」。如同其他蜥腳下目的恐龍，文雅龍是四足的植食性恐龍，但體型卻略為小型，身長不大於9米長。牠的頭呈方型，在頭頂上有高出的拱形物，以包含鼻孔。

name: Abydosaurus
description: Abydosaurus is a genus of brachiosaurid sauropod dinosaur known from skull and postcranial material found in upper Lower Cretaceous rocks of northeastern Utah, United States.
descriptionZh: 阿比杜斯龍屬 是蜥脚下目腕龙科的一属恐龙，生存於白堊紀早期的美國猶他州。阿比杜斯龍是少數發現完整頭顱骨的蜥腳類恐龍之一，也是第一個被發現完整頭顱骨的北美洲蜥腳類恐龍；大部分蜥腳類恐龍只發現顱後骨骼的個別骨頭。此外，阿比杜斯龍的牙齒狹窄，其他早期腕龍科的牙齒較寬。

name: Acantholipan
description: Acantholipan is a genus of herbivorous nodosaurid dinosaur from Mexico from the early Santonian age of the Late Cretaceous. It includes one species, Acantholipan gonzalezi.
descriptionZh: 棘刺灰人龙 是植食性结节龙科恐龙的一个属，生存于白垩纪晚期（桑托阶）的墨西哥，模式种是冈氏棘刺灰人龙。

name: Acanthopholis
description: Acanthopholis is a genus of ankylosaurian dinosaur in the family Nodosauridae that lived during the Late Cretaceous Period of England. A single species, A. horrida, exists.
descriptionZh: 棘甲龍屬 是甲龍亞目結節龍科下的一種恐龍，生活於上白堊紀的英格蘭，約1億年前，相當於森諾曼階。棘甲龍的鱗甲由橢圓形甲片組成，水平地排列於皮膚上，在頸部、肩膀有尖刺延伸出，沿者脊椎排列。牠們是四足的草食性恐龍。牠的大小估計約為3到5.5公尺長，體重接近380公斤。

name: Achelousaurus
description: Achelousaurus is a genus of centrosaurine ceratopsid dinosaur that lived during the Late Cretaceous Period of what is now North America, about 77 to 74.8 million years ago. The first fossils of Achelousaurus were collected in Montana in 1987, by a team led by Jack Horner, with more finds made in 1989. In 1994, Achelousaurus horneri was described and named by Scott D. Sampson; the generic name means "Achelous lizard", in reference to the Greek deity Achelous, and the specific name refers to Horne
descriptionZh: 河神龍屬 又譯阿奇洛龍，是尖角龍亞科恐龍的一個屬，生活在下白堊紀的北美洲，約7400萬年前。牠是四足的植食性恐龍，有著像鸚鵡的喙嘴，在鼻端及眼睛後方有骨質隆起，長頭盾頂端有兩隻角。河神龍屬於中型的角龍類，身長約6公尺，體重約3公噸。

name: Acheralichnus
description: Acheralichnus was a herbivore dinosaur that lived during the Cretaceous period.
descriptionZh: Acheralichnus是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Acheroraptor
description: Acheroraptor is an extinct genus of dromaeosaurid theropod dinosaur known from the latest Maastrichtian Hell Creek Formation of Montana, United States. It contains a single species, Acheroraptor temertyorum. A. temertyorum is one of the two geologically youngest known species of dromaeosaurids, the other being the possibly dubious Dakotaraptor steini, which is also known from the same formation. A basal cousin of Velociraptor, Acheroraptor is known from upper and lower jaw material.
descriptionZh: 冥河盗龙属 是一属已灭绝的驰龙科兽脚亚目恐龙，化石出自美国蒙大拿州晚白垩世马斯特里赫特阶的地獄溪組，目前仅含唯一种特氏冥河盗龙。在地质学上，冥河盗龙是已知生存年代最晚的两种驰龙类之一，另一种是达科他盗龙，化石同样发现于地狱溪组。该属是伶盗龙的一个原始近亲，所知于上颌与下颌材料。

name: Achillesaurus
description: Achillesaurus is a genus of alvarezsaurid theropod dinosaur from the Santonian-aged Bajo de la Carpa Formation of Rio Negro, Argentina. It contains one species, Achillesaurus manazzonei.
descriptionZh: 阿基里斯龍屬 屬於獸腳亞目的阿瓦拉慈龍科，化石發現於阿根廷里奥内格罗省的Bajo de la Carpa地層，地質年代為上白堊紀桑托階。

name: Achillobator
description: Achillobator is a genus of large dromaeosaurid theropod dinosaur that lived during the Late Cretaceous period about 96 million to 89 million years ago in what is now the Bayan Shireh Formation of Mongolia. The genus is currently monotypic, only including the type species A. giganticus. The first remains were found in 1989 during a Mongolian-Russian field expedition and later described in 1999. Remains at the type locality of Achillobator may represent additional specimens. It represents the firs
descriptionZh: 阿基里斯龍 是種大型驰龙科恐龍，生存於約9600萬至8900萬年前的白堊紀晚期的亞洲，化石出土於蒙古的巴彥思楞組。模式種兼唯一種巨型阿基里斯龍。首具遺骸於1989年蒙古－俄羅斯聯合考察期間所挖掘，後來於1999年被描述、命名。當初的發現地可能還存在其他標本。這是巴彥思楞組中發現的第一種也是體型最大的驰龙科。

name: Acristavus
description: Acristavus is a genus of saurolophine dinosaur. Fossils have been found from the Campanian Two Medicine Formation in Montana and Wahweap Formation in Utah, United States. The type species A. gagslarsoni was named in 2011. Unlike nearly all hadrosaurids except Edmontosaurus, Acristavus lacked ornamentation on its skull. The discovery of Acristavus is paleontologically significant because it supports the position that the ancestor of all hadrosaurids did not possess cranial ornamentation, and that
descriptionZh: 始無冠龍 是一屬櫛龍亞科的鴨嘴龍科恐龍，化石在美國蒙大拿州的雙麥迪森層及猶他州的瓦韋普層有出土，地質年代為晚白堊世坎潘期。模式種蓋氏始無冠龍 發表於2011年。不同於其他多數鴨嘴龍科，始無冠龍的頭骨缺乏任何冠飾構造。始無冠龍的重要意義在於，牠顯示所有鴨嘴龍科是從沒有冠飾的祖先演化而來，而櫛龍亞科與賴氏龍亞科後來各自獨立演化出冠飾。與始無冠龍最近緣的是短冠龍及慈母龍，牠們一同構成短冠龍族演化支。

name: Acrocanthosaurus
description: Acrocanthosaurus is a genus of carcharodontosaurid dinosaurs that existed in what is now North America during the Barremian and early Cenomanian stages of the Early Cretaceous and Late Cretaceous, from 125 to 99.6 million years ago. Like most dinosaur genera, Acrocanthosaurus contains only a single species, A. atokensis. It had a continent-wide range, with fossil remains known from the U.S. states of Oklahoma, Texas, and Wyoming in the west and Maryland in the east. However, most of these remain
descriptionZh: 高棘龍屬 又名高脊龍、多脊龍或阿克羅肯龍，是肉食龍下目異特龍超科鯊齒龍科的一個屬，生活在白堊紀中期（阿普第階到阿爾比階）的北美洲，接近1億1600萬年前到1億1000萬年前。如同大部分恐龍的屬，高棘龍只有單一種，阿托卡高棘龍。牠們的化石主要發現於美國的奧克拉荷馬州、德克萨斯州與懷俄明州，在馬里蘭州則發現了可能屬於高棘龍的牙齒。

name: Acrotholus
description: Acrotholus is an extinct genus of pachycephalosaurian dinosaur that lived during the Santonian of the late Cretaceous, in the Milk River Formation of Canada. The type species, A. audeti, was named after Roy Audet allowing access to his ranch leading to the discovery of the species. The discovery of this specimen lead to several new revelations in the fossil records questioning the preservation of small-bodied organisms along with the evolution of early pachycephalosaurs. The iconic cranial dome
descriptionZh: Acrotholus是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Actiosaurus
description: Actiosaurus is an extinct genus of reptile first described by Henri Sauvage in 1883 from Antully bonebed, Autun. The type species is A. gaudryi. Little is known of it, and it is considered a nomen dubium. Actiosaurus was originally described as a dinosaur in 1883 and was reinterpreted as an ichthyosaur in 1908. Actiosaurus may instead represent the remains of a choristodere. Fischer et al. (2014) considered A. gaudryi to be a species inquirenda, and noted the similarity of its bones to the limb
descriptionZh: 海岸龍屬 意為「海岸的蜥蜴」，是由Sauvage在1883年所敘述、命名，起初被認為是種恐龍，現在普遍被認為屬於魚龍目。但目前的所知有限，被認為是個疑名。模式種是A. gaudrii，常被誤值為A. gaudrii。

name: Adamantisaurus
description: Adamantisaurus is a poorly-known genus of titanosaurian sauropod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous Period of what is now South America. It is only known from six tail vertebrae but, as a sauropod, it can be assumed that this dinosaur was a very large animal with a long neck and tail.
descriptionZh: 阿達曼提龍屬 意為「阿達曼提納蜥蜴」，是種蜥腳下目泰坦巨龍類恐龍，生存於晚白堊紀的南美洲。目前僅發現六節尾椎。若參考其近親，可推測阿達曼提龍是種大型恐龍，具有長頸部、長尾巴，以及鱗甲。需要發現更多化石，才能做出更詳盡的研究。

name: Adasaurus
description: Adasaurus is a genus of dromaeosaurid dinosaur that lived in Asia during the Late Cretaceous period. The genus is known from two partial specimens found in the Nemegt Formation of Mongolia that were partially described in 1983 by the paleontologist Rinchen Barsbold.
descriptionZh: 惡靈龍屬，又名惡魔龍或阿達龍，是馳龍科下的一個屬，生活於上白堊紀的中亞洲。牠是小型的雙足肉食性恐龍，在後腳第二趾上有鐮刀狀的爪。根據2008年的估計值，成年的惡靈龍的身長約為1.8公尺長。。

name: Adelolophus
description: Adelolophus is a genus of lambeosaurine dinosaur from Upper Cretaceous rocks in the U.S. state of Utah. The type and only known species is A. hutchisoni; the type specimen consists only of a broken maxilla. It constitutes the oldest known lambeosaur remains from North America, as well as the only known lambeosaur species from the Wahweap Formation, of which it pertains to the Upper Member. Among its relatives, it seems to be particularly similar to Parasaurolophus, rather than animals like Lambe
descriptionZh: Adelolophus是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Adeopapposaurus
description: Adeopapposaurus is a genus of plateosaurian dinosaur from the Early Jurassic Cañón del Colorado Formation of San Juan, Argentina. It was similar to Massospondylus. Four partial skeletons with two partial skulls are known.
descriptionZh: Adeopapposaurus是一种生活在侏罗纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Adratiklit
description: Adratiklit is an extinct genus of stegosaurian dinosaur that lived on the supercontinent Gondwana during the Middle Jurassic. The genus contains a single species, Adratiklit boulahfa. Its remains were found in the El Mers III Formation, near Boulemane in north Morocco.
descriptionZh: 山嶽龍 是一屬劍龍亞目恐龍，生存於侏儸紀中期的岡瓦納大陸。模式種兼唯一種布拉法山嶽龍 的化石發現於摩洛哥非斯-梅克內斯大區布勒曼以南的布拉法（Boulahfa）附近的埃爾默斯群 的埃爾默斯組，地質年代為巴通階。

name: Adynomosaurus
description: Adynomosaurus is a genus of lambeosaurine dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous of what is now Catalonia, Spain. First discovered in 2012, it was named in 2019 with the type and only species being Adynomosaurus arcanus. It is only known from scant material, but is distinguished from other hadrosaurs by its weakly developed shoulder blade which would have had underdeveloped musculature, which lends it its scientific name, partially from the Greek word for "weak". Its exact relationships with other ha
descriptionZh: Adynomosaurus是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Aegyptosaurus
description: Aegyptosaurus is a genus of sauropod dinosaur discovered in Egypt, that lived in what is now Africa, around 95 million years ago, during the Late Cretaceous Period.
descriptionZh: 埃及龍屬 是泰坦巨龍類恐龍的一個屬，生活於白堊紀森诺曼阶的非洲，約9,500萬年前的。如同其他蜥腳類恐龍，埃及龍是四足的植食性恐龍，具有長頸部、小型頭顱骨，長尾巴被認為是當作其身體的平衡。埃及龍體重估計約11.5公噸，體長估計約達15公尺，身高約5公尺。埃及龍與生活在南美洲、體型更巨大的阿根廷龍是近親。

name: Aeolosaurus
description:
Aeolosaurus is a genus of titanosaurian sauropod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous Period of what is now South America. Like most sauropods, it would have been a quadrupedal herbivore with a long neck and tail. Aeolosaurus is well known for a titanosaur, as it is represented by the remains of several individuals belonging to at least two species. However, like most titanosaurs, no remains of the skull are known.
The holotype of Aeolosaurus rionegrinus consists of a series of seven tail vertebrae
descriptionZh: 風神龍 是一屬泰坦巨龍類的蜥腳下目恐龍，來自白堊紀的南美洲。如同多數蜥腳類，牠是四足步行的植食性動物，並有著長頸及長尾巴。以泰坦巨龍類來說，對於風神龍的瞭解算是比較多的，因為發現了至少屬於三個物種、多個個體的遺骸。然而也和許多泰坦巨龍類一樣沒有發現頭骨。模式種里奧內格羅風神龍 的正模標本包含一系列的7節尾椎、以及兩個部分前肢和右後肢；出土於阿根廷的紅安格斯圖娜組，年代可追溯至坎潘階（約8300萬至7400萬年前）。

name: Aepisaurus
description: Aepisaurus was a genus of sauropod dinosaur from the Albian-age Lower Cretaceous Grès vert of Département du Vaucluse, France, around 100.5 million years ago. It is an obscure genus from an unknown family, represented by a single humerus, now partly lost. Despite its lack of popularity, or perhaps because of it, it has been misspelled several ways in the scientific literature, with multiple dates given to the year of description as well.
descriptionZh: 高龍屬 又名象龍，是蜥腳下目恐龍的一個屬，生活於下白堊紀阿爾布階的法國沃克呂茲省，距今約1亿年前。化石只有一個肱骨，因此相關研究不多，也無法確定分類於哪一科。儘管高龍的名氣低，或者正是因為這樣，牠的屬名經常被拼錯，而有著很多不同的命名年份。

name: Aepyornithomimus
description: Aepyornithomimus is a genus of ornithomimid theropod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous Djadochta Formation of Mongolia. It lived in the Campanian, around 75 million years ago, when the area is thought to have been a desert. The type and only species is A. tugrikinensis.
descriptionZh: 似象鸟龙 是蒙古德加多克塔组的一属似鸟龙科兽脚类恐龙，生存于大约八千万年前的晚白垩世坎帕阶，被认为分布于当时的沙漠环境中。模式种是图格里克似象鸟龙。

name: Aerosteon
description: Aerosteon is a genus of megaraptoran dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous period of Argentina. Its remains were discovered in 1996 in the Anacleto Formation, which is from the late Campanian. The type and only known species is A. riocoloradensis. Its generic name can be translated as "air bone" and derives from Greek ἀήρ and ὀστέον, whereas its specific name indicates that its remains were found 1 km north of the Río Colorado, in Mendoza Province, Argentina. The genus shows evidence of a bird-like
descriptionZh: 氣腔龍屬 是種獸腳亞目大盜龍類恐龍，生存於白堊紀晚期的阿根廷。氣腔龍的化石是在1996年發現於門多薩省的Anacleto組地層，地質年代約8400萬年前，相當於桑托階。氣腔龍的化石具有類似鳥類的呼吸系統。

name: Aethyopus
description: Sauropus is a dinosaur imprint. One imprint given this name may be from a sitting dinosaur, perhaps made by a dinosaur similar to Psittacosaurus. The authors of The Beginning of the Age of Dinosaurs: Faunal Change across the Triassic-Jurassic Boundary argue that the name should be abandoned, because the original type specimen is "so worn as to be indeterminate", a second specimen "shows no indication whatsoever of manus impressions" and is judged to be a mix of impressions from different animals
descriptionZh: Aethyopus是一种生活在三叠纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Aetonychopus
description: Grallator is an ichnogenus which covers a common type of small, three-toed print made by a variety of bipedal theropod dinosaurs. Grallator-type footprints have been found in formations dating from the Early Triassic through to the early Cretaceous periods. They are found in the United States, Canada, Europe, India, Australia, Brazil and China, but are most abundant on the east coast of North America, especially the Triassic and Early Jurassic formations of the northern part of the Newark Superg
descriptionZh: Aetonychopus是一种生活在三叠纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Afrodelatorrichnus
description: Afrodelatorrichnus was a herbivore dinosaur that lived during the Jurassic period.
descriptionZh: Afrodelatorrichnus是一种生活在侏罗纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Afromimus
description: Afromimus is a genus of ceratosaurian theropod dinosaur from the Early Cretaceous Elrhaz Formation of Niger. It contains a single species, A. tenerensis, named in 2017 by Paul Sereno from parts of the right leg, vertebrae, and ribs found in the Ténéré Desert. It was originally described as a genus of ornithomimosaurian, but subsequent arguments have placed it as a taxon within or close to the superfamily Abelisauroidea.
descriptionZh: Afromimus是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Afrovenator
description: Afrovenator is an extinct genus of megalosaurid theropod dinosaur from the Middle or Late Jurassic Tiourarén Formation and maybe the Irhazer II Formation of the Sahara region of Niger in western Africa. Afrovenator represents the only named definitive Gondwanan megalosaur, with proposed material of the group present in the Tacuarembó Formation of Uruguay and the Tendaguru Formation of Tanzania, both dated to the Late Jurassic.
descriptionZh: 非洲猎龙 是斑龙科兽脚类恐龙的一个属，生存于中侏罗世的北非。

name: Agathaumas
description: Agathaumas is a dubious genus of a large ceratopsid dinosaur that lived in Wyoming during the Late Cretaceous. The name comes from Ancient Greek: αγαν - 'much' and θαυμα - 'wonder'. It was seen as the largest land animal known at the time of its discovery.
descriptionZh: 奇蹟龍屬 是角龍科下的一個屬，生活於上白堊紀的美國懷俄明州，年代估計為马斯特里赫特阶，距今約6600萬年前。牠的名字古希臘文意思為「大奇蹟」，因牠是首個被古生物學家發現及被描述的角龍科化石。由於牠的化石只有半個背部，相對地對牠的資料較為缺乏。牠被認為是疑名，古生物學家經常質疑奇蹟龍是否為有效屬，更有質疑牠只是被誤認的三角龍或牛角龍。

name: Ageroolithus
description: Ageroolithus is an oogenus of dinosaur egg. It may have been laid by a theropod.
descriptionZh: Ageroolithus是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Agialopous
description: Agialopous was a herbivore dinosaur that lived during the Triassic period.
descriptionZh: Agialopous是一种生活在三叠纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Agilisaurus
description: Agilisaurus is a genus of ornithischian dinosaur from the Middle Jurassic Period of what is now eastern Asia. The only named species is A. louderbacki, recovered from the Lower Shaximiao Formation of Sichuan, China. It was about 1.2–1.7 m (3.9–5.6 ft) in length, 60 cm (2.0 ft) in hip height, and 40 kg (88 lb) in weight. It has leaf-shaped teeth that were well-adapted to its abrasive, plant-based diet. Most surprisingly, the wavy enamel of the teeth of this genus, presumed to make them more resis
descriptionZh: 靈龍屬 是鳥臀目恐龍的一個屬，生活於侏羅紀中期的東亞。牠的名字是來自拉丁文的「靈敏」的意思，是因牠輕盈的骨骼及長腳而命名。牠的脛骨比股骨較長，顯示牠是極快的雙足奔跑者，並以其長尾巴作平衡。牠覓食時可能會四足行走。牠是小型的植食性恐龍，約1.2米長，與其他鳥臀目恐龍一樣，牠的上下頜前段形成喙嘴，可以幫助切碎植物。

name: Agnosphitys
description: Agnosphitys is a genus of dinosauriform that lived during the Late Triassic. It contains only one species, the type species A. cromhallensis. Its remains include an ilium, maxilla, astragalus and humerus, which date variously from the Norian and Rhaetian stages of the Late Triassic, or possibly as late as the Hettangian stage of the Early Jurassic. The fissure fill at Avon, of which Agnosphitys was probably recovered from, was a sinkhole formed by the dissolution of Lower Carboniferous limestone
descriptionZh: Agnosphitys是一种生活在三叠纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Agrosaurus
description: Agrosaurus is a potentially dubious genus of thecodontosaurid sauropodomorph probably originating from the Magnesian Conglomerate of England that was originally believed to be a Triassic prosauropod from Australia. Agrosaurus would thus be the oldest dinosaur from that country. However, this appears to have been an error, and the material actually appears to come from Thecodontosaurus or a Thecodontosaurus-like animal from Bristol, England. The type species is Agrosaurus macgillivrayi.
descriptionZh: Agrosaurus是一种生活在三叠纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Agujaceratops
description: Agujaceratops is a genus of chasmosaurine ceratopsid dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous (Campanian) of western Texas. Two species are known: A. mariscalensis and A. mavericus, both recovered from the Aguja Formation.
descriptionZh: 阿古哈角龍屬 是種最近發現的角龍下目恐龍，生存於晚白堊紀的坎潘階，約7700萬年前。最初是開角龍的一個種，近年建立為新屬。

name: Agustinia
description: Agustinia is a genus of sauropod dinosaur from the Early Cretaceous of South America. The genus contains a single species, A. ligabuei, known from a single specimen that was recovered from the Lohan Cura Formation of Neuquén Province in Argentina. It lived about 116–108 million years ago, in the Aptian–Albian stages of the Early Cretaceous Period.
descriptionZh: 奧古斯丁龍屬 是蜥腳下目恐龍的一個屬，生存於白堊紀早期的南美洲。如同其他蜥腳類恐龍，奧古斯丁龍是四足的植食性恐龍。被發現的一個腓骨約有89.5公分長。若與其他恐龍的同一骨頭相比，奧古斯丁龍的身長可以有約15米長。过去奥古斯丁龙曾被复原为有着独特“装甲”的一种恐龙，但现在已被确认属于復原錯誤。

name: Ahshislepelta
description: Ahshislepelta is a monospecific genus of ankylosaur dinosaur from New Mexico that lived during the Late Cretaceous in what is now the Hunter Wash Member of the Kirtland Formation. The type and only species, Ahshislepelta minor, is known only from an incomplete postcranial skeleton of a small subadult or adult individual. It was named in 2011 by Michael Burns and Robert M. Sullivan. Based on the size of the humerus, Ahshislepelta is larger than Pinacosaurus mephistocephalus but smaller than Talar
descriptionZh: 史色甲龍屬 是甲龍下目甲龍科恐龍的一屬，生存於白堊紀晚期的北美洲。

name: Ahshislesaurus
description: Ahshislesaurus is an extinct genus of saurolophine hadrosaurid dinosaurs known from the Late Cretaceous of what is now New Mexico, United States. It is known from a partial skull and three neck vertebrae discovered in 1916 and first described in 1935. Prior to its scientific naming, researchers debated whether the specimen belonged to Kritosaurus navajovius, a related species from the same layers of rocks, or a distinct animal. The genus contains a single species, Ahshislesaurus wimani, named in
descriptionZh: Ahshislesaurus是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Ajancingenia
description: Heyuannia is a genus of oviraptorid dinosaur that lived in Asia during the Late Cretaceous epoch, in what is now China and Mongolia. It was the first oviraptorid found in China; most others were found in neighbouring Mongolia. Two species are known: H. huangi, named by Lü Junchang in 2002 from the Dalangshan Formation; and H. yanshini, originally named as a separate genus Ingenia from the Barun Goyot Formation by Rinchen Barsbold in 1981, and later renamed to Ajancingenia in 2013 due to the preo
descriptionZh: 雌駝龍屬 又名母駝龍，是偷蛋龍科恐龍的一屬，身長約 1.4 至 2 公尺長，體重約 25 公斤重，生存於上白堊紀（約七千萬年前）的蒙古南部。

name: Ajkaceratops
description: Ajkaceratops is a genus of ceratopsian dinosaur described in 2010. It lived during the Late Cretaceous in the western Tethyan archipelago, in what is now Europe. The type species, A. kozmai, was originally described as a ceratopsian most closely related to forms in east Asia, from where its ancestors may have migrated by island-hopping. Later research, however, questioned this assignment and treated Ajkaceratops as an ornithischian of unresolved affinity. In 2026, more complete cranial remains r
descriptionZh: 奥伊考角龍屬 是角龍亞目恐龍的一屬，生活於上白堊纪的歐洲，當时相當於西特提斯群島，距今约8600萬到8400萬年前。奥伊考角龍的最近親位於亞洲，牠們的祖先可能藉由多個群島而從亞洲遷徙而來。

name: Ajnabia
description: Ajnabia is a genus of lambeosaurine hadrosaur from the Late Cretaceous (Maastrichtian) of Morocco. It is the first definitive hadrosaur from Africa and is thought to be related to European hadrosaurs like Adynomosaurus and Pararhabdodon. The discovery of Ajnabia came as a surprise to the paleontologists who found it because Africa was isolated by water from the rest of the world during the Cretaceous, such that hadrosaurs were assumed to have been unable to reach the continent.
descriptionZh: 異客龍屬 也可譯為羇客龍、外來龍或异域龙，是一屬賴氏龍亞科恐龍，來自白堊紀晚期（馬斯垂克階）的摩洛哥。牠是非洲第一個確認的鴨嘴龍科，並被認為與歐洲的艾瑞龍有接近親緣關係。異客龍的發現令古生物學家感到驚喜與意外，因為當時的非洲被海洋圍繞隔離於其他大陸，以前猜測鴨嘴龍類無法到達。

name: Akainacephalus
description: Akainacephalus is a monospecific genus of ankylosaurid dinosaur from southern Utah that lived during the Late Cretaceous in what is now the Horse Mountain Gryposaur Quarry of the Kaiparowits Formation. The type and only species, Akainacephalus johnsoni, is known from the most complete ankylosaur specimen ever discovered from southern Laramidia, including a complete skull, tail club, a number of osteoderms, limb elements and part of its pelvis, among other remains. It was described in 2018 by Jel
descriptionZh: 釘頭龍 是一屬植食性的甲龍科恐龍，來自美國猶他州南部的凱帕羅維茲組，年代為晚白堊世坎潘階（約7597萬年前）。模式種兼唯一種是約氏釘頭龍，已知化石是拉臘米迪亞南部發現過最完整的甲龍科標本，包括完整的頭骨、尾槌、數個皮內成骨、肢骨、部分骨盆以及其他遺骸。

name: Alamitornis
description: Alamitornis is an extinct genus of basal ornithuromorph dinosaurs, possibly within the family Patagopterygidae. Remains have been found in the Upper Cretaceous Los Alamitos Formation at Los Alamitos, Río Negro Province, Argentina. It was first named by Federico L. Agnolin and Agustín G. Martinelli in 2009 and the type species is Alamitornis minutus.
descriptionZh: 阿拉米托斯鸟 是原始今鸟型类恐龙已灭绝的一个属，可能属于巴塔哥鸟科。其遗骸发现于阿根廷内格罗河省洛斯阿拉米托斯的晚白垩世洛斯阿拉米托斯组。该属由费德里科·阿格诺林 和奥古斯丁·马丁内利 于2009年命名，模式种是小阿拉米托斯鸟。

name: Alamosaurus
description: Alamosaurus is a genus of titanosaurian sauropod dinosaurs containing a single known species, Alamosaurus sanjuanensis, from the Maastrichtian age of the Late Cretaceous period in what is now southwestern North America. It is one of the few known titanosaurs to have inhabited North America after the nearly 30-million-year absence of sauropods from the North American fossil record and probably represents an immigrant from South America.
descriptionZh: 阿拉摩龍屬 又譯阿拉莫龍，白杨山巨龙，是蜥腳下目泰坦巨龍類薩爾塔龍科的一個屬，生活於晚白垩世的北美洲。牠們是一種大型的四足的植食性恐龍，阿拉摩龍與其他蜥腳下目的恐龍相似，有著長的頸部及尾巴，尾巴末端有著類似鞭索的結構。

name: Alaripeda
description: Alaripeda was a herbivore dinosaur that lived during the Cretaceous period.
descriptionZh: Alaripeda是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Alaskacephale
description: Alaskacephale is an extinct genus of pachycephalosaurid, a group of dome-headed, herbivorous ornithischian dinosaurs, that lived during the Maastrichtian stage of the Late Cretaceous period in what is now northern Alaska. The genus is one of the few known Arctic dinosaurs and was found in the Prince Creek Formation, which preserves a menagerie of fossils. The only known specimen, a squamosal bone, was found in 1999 and later described in 2005. However, Alaskacephale was not formally named until
descriptionZh: 阿拉斯加頭龍屬 是種厚頭龍科恐龍，生存於晚白堊紀的晚坎潘階，約8000萬年前到6900萬年前。化石出土於阿拉斯加州的王子溪層。

name: Albalophosaurus
description: Albalophosaurus is a genus of marginocephalian ornithischian dinosaur that lived in Japan during the Early Cretaceous. The type species is Albalophosaurus yamaguchiorum.
descriptionZh: 白峰龍屬 是鳥臀目角龍亞目的一屬恐龍。化石是在1997年由小林快次發現於日本石川縣的白川市，屬於手取群 的桑島組 地層，地質年代為白堊紀早期。

name: Albertaceratops
description: Albertaceratops is a genus of centrosaurine horned dinosaur from the middle Campanian-age Upper Cretaceous Oldman Formation of Alberta, Canada.
descriptionZh: 亞伯達角龍屬 是尖角龍亞科恐龍的一個屬，化石發現於加拿大亞伯達省的老人組，地質年代屬於白堊紀晚期的坎潘階中期。

name: Albertadromeus
description: Albertadromeus is an extinct genus of orodromine thescelosaurid dinosaur known from the upper part of the Late Cretaceous Oldman Formation of Alberta, Canada. It contains a single species, Albertadromeus syntarsus.
descriptionZh: 阿尔伯塔奔龙 是一属已灭绝的奇异龙科山奔龙亚科恐龙，化石发现于加拿大阿尔伯塔省晚白垩世后期中坎帕阶的老人组，仅含单一物种合踝阿尔伯塔奔龙。

name: Albertavenator
description: Albertavenator is a genus of small-bodied troodontid theropod dinosaur that lived during the early Maastrichtian stage of the Late Cretaceous period, approximately 71 million years ago. It is known from the Horseshoe Canyon Formation in Alberta, Canada, and is currently represented by a single species, Albertavenator curriei. The species name honors Canadian paleontologist Philip J. Currie for his extensive contributions to theropod research. The animal is known from parts of the skull.
descriptionZh: 艾伯塔獵龍 是兽脚类伤齿龙科的一个属，生活於白堊紀晚期的马斯特里赫特階早期，其下仅有一个种，柯氏艾伯塔獵龍，种名纪念加拿大古生物学家菲尔·柯里。该属基于部分1990年发现于马蹄峡谷组的部分左额骨。艾伯塔獵龍的发现表明，由于难以从碎片遗骸中识别物种，小型恐龙的生物多样性可能被低估了。

name: Albertonykus
description: Albertonykus is an extinct genus of alvarezsaurid dinosaur from the Maastrichtian-age rocks of the Horseshoe Canyon Formation of Alberta, Canada. It is known from forelimb and hindlimb remains from multiple individuals. All but two of the specimens come from a bonebed dominated by Albertosaurus, located at the top of Unit 4 of the Horseshoe Canyon Formation, dating to ~68.5 million years ago.
descriptionZh: 亞伯達爪龍屬 是獸腳亞目阿瓦拉慈龍科的一屬，化石發現於加拿大亞伯達省的馬蹄峽谷組，地質年代為上白堊紀的馬斯垂克階早期，約6850萬年前。化石來自於數個個體，包含前肢與後肢。化石發現於一個充滿亞伯達龍的屍骨層。亞伯達爪龍的前肢似乎適合挖掘，但太短而不能挖掘出洞穴，因此被認為以白蟻為食。在美國蒙大拿州與懷俄明州也發現了個別的阿瓦拉慈龍科化石。

name: Albertosaurus
description: Albertosaurus is a genus of large tyrannosaurid theropod dinosaur that lived in northwestern North America during the early to middle Maastrichtian age of the Late Cretaceous period, about 71 million years ago. The type species, A. sarcophagus, was apparently restricted in range to the modern-day Canadian province of Alberta, after which the genus is named, although an indeterminate species has been discovered in the Corral de Enmedio and Packard Formations of Mexico. Scientists disagree on the
descriptionZh: 艾伯塔龍屬，又名阿爾伯托龍、艾伯托龍，是暴龍科艾伯塔龍亞科恐龍的一屬，生活於上白堊紀的北美洲西部，距今超過7000萬年前。模式種是肉食艾伯塔龍，化石是在加拿大艾伯塔省的省立恐龙公园發現，並以此省作為該屬的名字。科學家們對於艾伯塔龍有幾個種，有著不同的意見，有些科學家將平衡蛇髮女怪龍 列為第二個種。

name: Albinykus
description: Albinykus is a genus of alvarezsaurid dinosaur whose fossils have been found in the Late Cretaceous-aged (Santonian) Javkhlant Formation in the Gobi Desert of Mongolia. The type species, A. baatar, was named by Sterling J. Nesbitt, Julia A. Clarke, Alan H. Turner and Mark A. Norell in 2011.
descriptionZh: 游光爪龍屬 是獸腳亞目阿瓦拉慈龍科恐龍的一屬，生存於白堊紀晚期的蒙古。

name: Alcmonavis
description: Alcmonavis is a basal genus of avialan dinosaur that during the Late Jurassic lived in the area of present Germany. The only named species in the genus is Alcmonavis poeschli. Its only known fossil was originally reported as a specimen of Archaeopteryx.
descriptionZh: Alcmonavis是一种生活在侏罗纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Alcovasaurus
description: Alcovasaurus is an extinct genus of herbivorous stegosaurian dinosaurs that lived in the Late Jurassic. It was found in the Morrison Formation of Wyoming, United States. The genus contains a single species, Alcovasaurus longispinus, originally assigned to the genus Stegosaurus. It is likely a member of the Dacentrurinae, and has been referred to the genus Miragaia by some authors.
descriptionZh: 阿爾科瓦龍 是一屬劍龍科裝甲類恐龍，生存於侏儸紀晚期的北美洲。化石發現於美國懷俄明州納特羅納縣的莫里遜組。模式種長刺阿爾科瓦龍 曾經被歸為劍龍屬的一個種長刺劍龍。

name: Alectrosaurus
description: Alectrosaurus is a genus of tyrannosauroid theropod dinosaur that lived in Asia during the Late Cretaceous period, about some 96 million years ago in what is now the Iren Dabasu Formation.
descriptionZh: 獨龍屬，又名獨身龍、鷹龍、阿萊龍或阿萊克特龍，是暴龍超科恐龍的一個屬，生存於上白堊紀的中國內蒙古。獨龍是雙足的肉食性恐龍，與其他大型近親（如暴龍）的外形相似。獨龍的體型比較小型，只有約5米長。

name: Alethoalaornis
description: Alethoalaornis was a herbivore dinosaur that lived during the Cretaceous period.
descriptionZh: 真翼鳥 為已滅絕的反鳥亞綱的真反鳥類，發現於中國遼寧省朝陽縣九佛堂組，生存於白堊紀前期。

name: Aletopelta
description: Aletopelta is a monospecific genus of basal ankylosaurid dinosaur from Southern California that lived during the Late Cretaceous in what is now the Point Loma Formation. The type and only species, Aletopelta coombsi, is known from a partial skeleton preserving osteoderms. It was originally described in 1996 by W. P. Coombs, Jr. and T.A. Deméré before being named in 2001 by Tracy Ford and James Kirkland. Aletopelta has an estimated size of 5 metres and weight of 2 tonnes. The holotype formed a mi
descriptionZh: 漂泊甲龍屬 是種鳥臀目甲龍亞目恐龍，化石發現於美國加州南部。

name: Alexornis
description: Alexornis was a genus of enantiornithine birds from the La Bocana Roja Formation of Baja California, Mexico. This geological formation has been dated to the late Cretaceous period, and more specifically to the Cenomanian and Turonian ages, about 93.6 mya. The type and only known species is Alexornis antecedens. The scientific name as a whole means "Alex's ancestral bird"; Alexornis from the given name of ornithologist Alexander Wetmore + Ancient Greek ornis, "bird", and antecedens, Latin for "go
descriptionZh: 阿克西鳥 是白堊紀晚期的一屬反鳥亞綱鳥類。其下只有一個物種始祖阿克西鳥。

name: Alioramus
description: Alioramus is a genus of tyrannosaurid theropod dinosaurs from the Late Cretaceous period of Asia. It currently contains two species. The type species, A. remotus is known from a partial skull and three foot bones recovered from the Mongolian Nemegt Formation, which was deposited in a humid floodplain. These remains were named and described by Soviet paleontologist Sergei Kurzanov in 1976. A second species, A. altai, known from a much more complete skeleton also from the Nemegt Formation, was nam
descriptionZh: 分支龍屬，又名歧龍、阿利奧拉龍，是獸腳亞目暴龍科下的一個屬，生活於上白堊紀的蒙古。分支龍是由蘇聯古生物學家Sergei Kurzanov在1976年所命名。模式種是遙遠分支龍，化石包含一個部份顱骨、三個蹠骨，發現於蒙古，該地在7000萬年前到6500萬年前是片氾濫平原。第二個種是阿爾泰分支龍，化石是一個更完整的骨骼，是由Stephen L. Brusatte等人在2009年命名。

name: Aliwalia
description: Eucnemesaurus is a basal sauropodomorph dinosaur genus usually considered to be a synonym of Euskelosaurus. Recent study by Yates (2006), however, indicates that it is valid and the same animal as putative "giant herrerasaurid" Aliwalia.
descriptionZh: Aliwalia是一种生活在三叠纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Almas
description: Almas was a herbivore dinosaur that lived during the Cretaceous period.
descriptionZh: 阿尔马斯 是巴西托坎廷斯州的一个市镇。总面积4021.111平方公里，总人口7488人，人口密度1.9人/平方公里。

name: Alnashetri
description: Alnashetri is an extinct genus of alvarezsauroid coelurosaurian theropod dinosaur known from the early Late Cretaceous of La Buitrera, Río Negro Province, Argentina. It contains one known species, Alnashetri cerropoliciensis. Its remains were discovered in Candeleros Formation.
descriptionZh: Alnashetri是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Alocodon
description: Alocodon is a genus of ornithischian dinosaur known from multiple teeth from the Middle or Late Jurassic Cabaços Formation of Portugal, and also the Forest Marble and Chipping Norton Formations of England. A single species is known, A. kuehnei.
descriptionZh: Alocodon是一种生活在侏罗纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Alpkarakush
description: Alpkarakush is an extinct genus of metriacanthosaurid theropod dinosaurs from the Jurassic Balabansai Formation of Kyrgyzstan. The genus contains a single species, A. kyrgyzicus, known from a partial skeleton.
descriptionZh: 神鸟龙属 是中棘龙科兽脚类的一个属，来自吉尔吉斯斯坦的侏罗纪巴拉班塞组。属下包括单一物种吉尔吉斯神鸟龙，僅有部分骨骼被發現。

name: Altirhinus
description: Altirhinus is a genus of hadrosauroid ornithopod dinosaur from the Early Cretaceous period of Mongolia.
descriptionZh: 高吻龍屬 是鴨嘴龍超科下的一個屬，生活於下白堊紀的蒙古。高吻龍是雙足行走的植食性恐龍，但在攝食時則可以四足站立的。整個身長由鼻端至尾巴可能約8公尺。在2010年，美國古生物學家葛瑞格利·保羅估計其身長約6.5公尺，體重約1.1公噸。單是頭顱骨就有760公分長，高吻龍有寬廣的口鼻部，鼻端上有一個明顯的高拱，高吻龍亦因此得名。

name: Alvarezsaurus
description: Alvarezsaurus is a genus of alvarezsaurid dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous, living in Argentina approximately 86 - 83 million years ago. It was a small dinosaur, measuring 1–1.4 m (3.3–4.6 ft) long and weighing approximately 3 kg (6.6 lb). It was found in the Bajo de la Carpa Formation and was named by paleontologist José Bonaparte in 1991 after the historian Don Gregorio Alvarez. The type species is A. calvoi.
descriptionZh: 阿尔瓦雷斯龙 或译阿瓦拉慈龙，是一屬阿尔瓦雷斯龙科的虛骨龍類恐龍，生存於約8600萬至8300萬年前的白堊紀晚期，分佈範圍相當於現在的阿根廷巴塔哥尼亞地区北部。估計身長1-1.4米，體重约3千克或相当于一只火鸡。化石出土於巴霍德拉卡帕组，並於1991年由古生物學家何塞·波拿巴命名、發表，模式種兼唯一種是卡氏阿尔瓦雷斯龙，屬名紀念阿根廷历史学家格雷戈里奥·阿尔瓦雷斯。

name: Alwalkeria
description: Alwalkeria is a historically problematic extinct genus of avemetatarsalian known from the Late Triassic Lower Maleri Formation of India. The genus contains a single species, Alwalkeria maleriensis. It was initially described in 1987 under the genus name 'Walkeria', based on a partial skull, several vertebrae, and fragmentary hindlimb bones. As this name is preoccupied, the new genus Alwalkeria was proposed to replace it. Early research interpreted the material belonging to a 'podokesaurid' (coel
descriptionZh: 艾沃克龍屬 是原始蜥臀目恐龍的一屬，生活於三疊紀晚期的印度。牠是小型的雙足雜食性恐龍。

name: Alxasaurus
description: Alxasaurus is a genus of therizinosauroid theropod dinosaurs from the Early Cretaceous Bayin-Gobi Formation of Inner Mongolia. It is known from five specimens, recovered from the Bayin-Gobi in 1988, as part of the China-Canada Dinosaur Project. During their preparation, palaeontologists Dong Zhiming and Dale Russell noted strong similarities to Segnosaurus. In 1993, they described Alxasaurus and named its type species, A. elesitaiensis. While therizinosaurs had previously been tentatively seen a
descriptionZh: 阿拉善龍屬，是鐮刀龍超科下的一個屬，生活於下白堊紀的中國內蒙古。牠是鐮刀龍超科內最早發現的恐龍之一，化石仍然保有其形狀：包括長頸、短尾及長指爪。與其他的後期鐮刀龍類恐龍一樣，牠是雙足的草食性恐龍，有著大型的內臟來處理植物食物。目前已經發現幾個標本，當中最大型的是一頭幼龍，身長超過3.8米長。

name: Amanzia
description: Amanzia is a genus of turiasaurian sauropod dinosaur from the Late Jurassic Reuchenette Formation in Moutier, Switzerland. The type and only species is Amanzia greppini, originally named as a species of Ornithopsis and Cetiosauriscus.
descriptionZh: 阿曼茲龍 是来自瑞士穆捷鲁切内特组的一屬图里亚龙类蜥脚下目恐龙。模式種和唯一的物種是格氏阿曼茲龍，最初被命名为鸟面龍的一個物種。

name: Amargasaurus
description: Amargasaurus is a genus of sauropod dinosaur from the Early Cretaceous epoch of what is now Argentina. The only known skeleton was discovered in 1984 and is virtually complete, including a fragmentary skull, making Amargasaurus one of the best-known sauropods of its epoch. Amargasaurus was first described in 1991 and contains a single known species, Amargasaurus cazaui. It was a large animal, but small for a sauropod, reaching 9 to 13 meters in length. Most distinctively, it sported two parallel
descriptionZh: 阿馬加龍 是種叉龍科的蜥腳類恐龍，化石來自早白堊世（約1億2940萬至1億2246萬年前）的阿根廷。唯一一具已知標本是於1984年發現相對完整的骨骼，並含有頭骨碎片，使其成為該時代所知最詳盡的蜥腳類。1991年描述了模式種兼唯一種卡氏阿馬加龍。牠是大型動物，但以蜥腳類平均來說算小型，身長約9至10公尺。其最顯著特徵為頸部至前背有兩排平行的高刺，比所有其他蜥腳類都長；關於這些刺的生前樣貌有兩種可能的論點，比較普遍認同的是覆蓋角質鞘的延伸刺狀結構，另一個頗具爭議的是作為皮膜帆狀物的支撐；推測功能可能有展示、戰鬥或防禦。

name: Amargastegos
description: This list of informally named dinosaurs is a listing of dinosaurs that have never been given formally published scientific names. This list only includes names that were not properly published and have not since been published under a valid name. The following types of names are present on this list:Nomen nudum, Latin for "naked name": A name that has appeared in print but has not yet been formally published by the standards of the International Commission on Zoological Nomenclature. Nomina nuda
descriptionZh: Amargastegos是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Amargatitanis
description: Amargatitanis is a genus of dicraeosaurid sauropod dinosaur from the Barremian-aged La Amarga Formation of Neuquén, Argentina. It is known from a single, incomplete postcranial skeleton consisting of a partial hindlimb, ischium, and two vertebrae. These remains were unearthed by Argentine paleontologist José Bonaparte in 1983 during an expedition by the Museo Argentino de Ciencias Naturales and later described as a new genus and species, Amargatitanis macni by Sebastián Apesteguía. The genus nam
descriptionZh: 阿马加巨龙 是阿根廷内乌肯省早白垩世（巴列姆阶）阿马加组的一属叉龙科蜥脚类恐龙。

name: Amazonsaurus
description: Amazonsaurus is a genus of diplodocoid sauropod dinosaur from the Early Cretaceous Period of what is now South America. It would have been a large-bodied quadrupedal herbivore with a long neck and whiplash tail. Although more derived diplodocoids were some of the longest animals ever to exist, Amazonsaurus was probably not more than 12 meters (40 ft) long. Gregory S. Paul estimated in 2010 its weight at 5000 kg.
descriptionZh: Amazonsaurus是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Ambiortus
description: Ambiortus is an extinct genus of ornithuromorph dinosaurs. The only known species, Ambiortus dementjevi, lived sometime during the Barremian age between 136.4 and 125 million years ago in the Andaikhudag Formation of Mongolia. It was discovered by Yevgeny Kurochkin in 1982.
descriptionZh: Ambiortus是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Amblonyx
description: The Asian small-clawed otter, also called oriental small-clawed otter and small-clawed otter, is an otter species native to South and Southeast Asia. It has short claws that do not extend beyond the pads of its webbed digits. With a total body length of 730 to 960 mm, and a maximum weight of 3.5 kg (7.7 lb), it is the smallest otter species.
descriptionZh: Amblonyx是一种生活在侏罗纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Amblydactylus
description: Amblydactylus is an ichnogenus that has been attributed to dinosaurs. The generic name, derived from the Greek words amblys and dáktylos, means "dull finger". Two species of Amlydactylus have been named: A. gethingi, which references the Gething Formation where it was found; and A. kortmeyeri, which honours Carl kortmeyer who discovered the holotype.
descriptionZh: Amblydactylus是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Ambopteryx
description: Ambopteryx is a genus of scansoriopterygid dinosaur from the Oxfordian stage of the Late Jurassic of China. It is the second dinosaur to be found with both feathers and bat-like membranous wings. Yi, the first such dinosaur, was described in 2015 and is the sister taxon to Ambopteryx. The holotype specimen is thought to be a sub-adult or adult. The specimen is estimated to have had a body length of 32 centimetres (13 in) and a weight of 306 grams (10.8 oz). The genus includes one species, Ambopt
descriptionZh: 浑元龙属 是一属擅攀鸟龙科恐龙，生存于晚侏罗世牛津阶的中国。它是第二种既有羽毛又有类似蝙蝠的膜翅的恐龙。奇翼龙是第一种这样的恐龙，于2015年被描述，是浑元龙的姐妹群。正模标本被认为是成体或亚成体。据估计，这具标本的身长为32厘米（13英寸），体重为306克（0.675磅）。本属仅含一个物种，即模式种长臂浑元龙。

name: Ammosaurus
description: Anchisaurus is a genus of basal sauropodomorph dinosaur. It lived during the Early Jurassic Period, and its fossils have been found in the red sandstone of the Upper Portland Formation, Northeastern United States, which was deposited from the Hettangian age into the Sinemurian age, between about 200 and 192 million years ago. Until recently it was classed as a member of Prosauropoda. The genus name Anchisaurus comes from the Greek αγχι anchi-; "near, close" + Greek σαυρος ; "lizard". Anchisaurus
descriptionZh: 砂龍屬 是蜥腳形亞目近蜥龍科恐龍的一個屬，生活於侏羅紀早至中期的北美洲。砂龍的身長約有4米，但與其他蜥腳形亞目恐龍相比，體型較小型。牠可以採取雙足或四足方式行走，而且可能是雜食性動物。

name: Ampelognathus
description: Ampelognathus is an extinct genus of possibly rhabdodontomorph ornithopod dinosaurs from the Late Cretaceous (Cenomanian) Lewisville Formation of Texas. The type species is Ampelognathus coheni.
descriptionZh: 葡颌龙 是小型鸟脚类恐龙的一个属，来自德克萨斯晚白垩世（森诺曼阶）的路易斯维尔组。模式种是科氏葡颌龙。

name: Ampelosaurus
description: Ampelosaurus is a titanosaurian sauropod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous Period of what is now France. Its type species is A. atacis, named by Le Loeuff in 1995. Its remains were found in a level dating from 71.5 million years ago representing the early Maastrichtian.
descriptionZh: 葡萄園龍 是一屬泰坦巨龍類的蜥腳類恐龍，生存於白堊紀晚期的歐洲，化石發現於法國南部奥德河畔康帕涅附近的下紅泥灰層。模式種奧德河葡萄園龍 於1995年由讓·呂勒福 命名、發表。另一個可能的未命名種，將葡萄園龍的生存年代延伸到白堊紀最末期的馬斯垂克階，約7000萬至6600萬年前。

name: Amphicoelias
description: Amphicoelias is a genus of herbivorous sauropod dinosaur that lived approximately 150 million years ago during the Tithonian of what is now Colorado, United States. Amphicoelias was moderately sized at about 18 metres (59 ft) in length and 15 metric tons in body mass, shorter than its close relative Diplodocus. Its hindlimbs were very long and thin, and its forelimbs were proportionally longer than in relatives.
descriptionZh: 雙腔龍屬 是蜥腳下目梁龍科恐龍的一個屬。雙腔龍的學名是由古希臘文的「amphi」（意即「兩面」）及「koilos」（意即「空腔」或「空洞」）而來，所以中文翻譯為雙腔龍。根據唯一的骨頭化石，長度估計約達40-60公尺，而體重可能約為122公噸，可比現今最重的動物藍鯨。但在1870年代描述這種恐龍後不久，這塊唯一的骨頭就遺失了，存有的證據就只有一些插圖及紀錄。雙腔龍的化石，都發現於莫里遜組的第6地層帶。

name: Amphisaurus
description: Anchisaurus is a genus of basal sauropodomorph dinosaur. It lived during the Early Jurassic Period, and its fossils have been found in the red sandstone of the Upper Portland Formation, Northeastern United States, which was deposited from the Hettangian age into the Sinemurian age, between about 200 and 192 million years ago. Until recently it was classed as a member of Prosauropoda. The genus name Anchisaurus comes from the Greek αγχι anchi-; "near, close" + Greek σαυρος ; "lizard". Anchisaurus
descriptionZh: 近蜥龍屬（屬名Anchisaurus）又譯安琪龍，是近蜥龙类恐龍的一個屬，生存於侏儸紀早期，約2億到1億9500萬年前。近蜥龍過去曾被歸類於原蜥腳下目。近蜥龍的名稱是代替原先所定的名稱「Amphisaurus」及「Megadactylus」，這兩個名稱都已被其他動物所使用。屬名是由希臘文的「接近」及「蜥蜴」結合而成，是根據馬什的說法，他認為近蜥龍是一種較原始的恐龍 與進階型恐龍的過渡型動物。

name: Amtocephale
description: Amtocephale is a genus of pachycephalosaurid dinosaur from early Late Cretaceous deposits of southern Gobi Desert, Mongolia.
descriptionZh: 阿米特頭龍屬 是厚頭龍亚目恐龍的一屬，生存於白堊紀晚期的蒙古國

name: Amtosaurus
description: Amtosaurus is a genus of ornithischian dinosaur based on a fragmentary skull collected from the Late Cretaceous Bayanshiree Formation of Mongolia and originally believed to represent an ankylosaurid. Hadrosaurid affinities have also been suggested. However, according to Parish and Barrett, this specimen is too fragmentary to be reliably classified beyond an indeterminate ornithischian. A second species assigned to the genus, A. archibaldi, has become the basis of a valid ankylosaurid taxon, Biss
descriptionZh: Amtosaurus是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Amurosaurus
description: Amurosaurus is a genus of lambeosaurine hadrosaurid dinosaur found in Late Cretaceous deposits of what is now eastern Asia.
descriptionZh: 阿穆爾龍屬 是鴨嘴龍科賴氏龍亞科恐龍的一個屬，生活於白堊紀最末期的北亞，約6600萬年前。與其他賴氏龍亞科一樣，牠主要是雙足的草食性恐龍，有著鴨嘴獸般的鼻端，及頭頂有一個空冠，但是還沒有被發現頭冠的化石。成年阿穆爾龍的化石很稀少，但估計最少有6米長。

name: Amygdalodon
description: Amygdalodon is an extinct genus of basal sauropod from the Early Jurassic of Argentina. The type species is Amygdalodon patagonicus. Fossils of Amygdalodon have been found in the Toarcian-aged Cerro Carnerero Formation. Very little is known about it, but it is one of the few Jurassic dinosaurs from South America found thus far.
descriptionZh: 杏齒龍屬 是蜥腳下目恐龍的一屬，是一種長頸的四足植食性恐龍，生存於侏羅紀。杏齒龍約為15公尺長，4公尺高。体形中等，體重約達24公噸。

name: Anabisetia
description: Anabisetia is a genus of ornithopod dinosaur from the Late Cretaceous Period of Patagonia, South America. It was a small bipedal herbivore, around 2 metres long.
descriptionZh: 阿納拜斯龍屬 是薄板类恐龍的一個屬，生活於白堊紀的南美洲巴塔哥尼亞。牠是雙足的植食性恐龍，約有2公尺長。

name: Analong
description: Analong is an extinct genus of mamenchisaurid sauropod from the Chuanjie Formation in Yunnan, China. The type and only species is Analong chuanjieensis.
descriptionZh: 阿納龍 是一屬馬門溪龍科的蜥腳下目恐龍，生存於侏羅紀中期，化石來自中國雲南的川街組。正模標本LFGT LCD 9701–1發現於1995年，並於2011年被編入川街龍屬。然而在2020年任鑫鑫等人指出該標本與川街龍正模標本的許多差異足以建立成新屬。模式種兼唯一種是川街阿納龍。支序分析將阿納龍描述為馬門溪龍科的早期分支：

name: Anasazisaurus
description: Anasazisaurus is a genus of saurolophine hadrosaurid ("duckbill") ornithopod dinosaur that lived about 74 million years ago, in the Late Cretaceous Period. It was found in the Farmington Member of the Kirtland Formation, in the San Juan Basin of New Mexico, United States. Only a partial skull has been found to date. It was first described as a specimen of Kritosaurus by Jack Horner, and has been intertwined with Kritosaurus since its description. It is known for its short nasal crest, which stuc
descriptionZh: 阿納薩齊龍屬 是種鳥腳亞目鴨嘴龍科恐龍，生存於晚白堊紀，約7400萬年前。化石發現於美國新墨西哥州聖胡安縣的嘉德蘭組，目前只發現一個部份顱骨。這個化石最初被傑克·霍納 歸類於小貴族龍。阿納薩齊龍的著名處在於鼻部上的短頭冠，從兩眼中間往頭後延伸。

name: Anatalavis
description: Anatalavis is genus of prehistoric birds related to ducks and geese, perhaps to the magpie-goose in particular. Alternatively, it might have been a more basal lineage of Anserimorphae distinct from the living waterfowl, similar or even related to the roughly contemporary Conflicto antarcticus from the Danian of Antarctica.
descriptionZh: Anatalavis是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Anatosaurus
description: Edmontosaurus annectens, often colloquially and historically known as Anatosaurus, is a species of flat-headed saurolophine hadrosaurid dinosaur from the late Maastrichtian age at the very end of the Cretaceous period, in what is now western North America. Remains of E. annectens have been preserved in the Frenchman, Hell Creek, and Lance Formations. All of these formations are dated to the late Maastrichtian age of the Late Cretaceous period, which represents the last three million years before
descriptionZh: 鴨龍 原是鴨嘴龍科恐龍的一個屬，由於其下的已知種都已經被分到埃德蒙頓龍與大鴨龍中，而被認為是埃德蒙頓龍的次異名，或是個無效名稱。

name: Anatotitan
description: Edmontosaurus annectens, often colloquially and historically known as Anatosaurus, is a species of flat-headed saurolophine hadrosaurid dinosaur from the late Maastrichtian age at the very end of the Cretaceous period, in what is now western North America. Remains of E. annectens have been preserved in the Frenchman, Hell Creek, and Lance Formations. All of these formations are dated to the late Maastrichtian age of the Late Cretaceous period, which represents the last three million years before
descriptionZh: 连接埃德蒙顿龙，为埃德蒙顿龙属的一种，属于鸭嘴龙科（Hadrosauridae）中的栉龙亚科（Saurolophinae），生活在白垩纪最末期的北美洲。它的遗骸被发现于地獄溪组与兰斯组。这些组的地质年代为白垩纪晚期的马斯垂可阶晚期，距白垩纪——第三纪灭绝事件还有200万年（距今6,800万年前至6,600万年前）。连接埃德蒙顿龙目前已发现了数个标本，包括至少20个部分到完整的头颅骨，发现于美国蒙大拿州、南达科他州和怀俄明州，还有加拿大的萨斯喀彻温。它是一种巨大的动物，大约12米（39英尺）长，还有非常长而矮的头骨。连接埃德蒙顿龙有很漫长的分类历史，先后分类为鸭龙属、大鸭龙属、破碎龙属、双芽龙属、强龙属、糙齿龙属。

name: Anatrisauropus
description: Anatrisauropus is an ichnogenus of dinosaur footprint, possibly belonging to a saurischian. It has only been discovered in Lesotho. Three ichnospecies are known: A. camisardi, A. ginsburgi and A. hereroensis; all of which were named by Paul Ellenberger between 1965 and 1972.
descriptionZh: Anatrisauropus是一种生活在三叠纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Anchiceratops
description:
Anchiceratops is an extinct genus of chasmosaurine ceratopsid dinosaur that lived approximately 73 to 68 million years ago during the latter part of the Cretaceous Period in what is now Alberta, Canada.
Anchiceratops was a medium-sized, heavily built, ground-dwelling, quadrupedal herbivore that could grow up to an estimated 4.3 metres (14 ft) long. Its skull featured two long brow horns and a short horn on the nose. The skull frill was elongated and rectangular, its edges adorned by coarse trian
descriptionZh: 準角龍屬 又稱安琪角龍，是角龍亞科下的一個屬，生活於上白堊紀的北美洲西部。牠是四足的草食性恐龍，臉部有三隻角、鸚鵡般的喙狀嘴，頭後有長的頭盾。在眼睛上方的兩隻額角較鼻角為長。準角龍約有6公尺長。準角龍的頭盾非常獨特。頭盾是呈長方形，邊緣有大型的三角形頸盾緣骨突（Epoccipital），以及比五角龍與牛角龍較小型的洞孔。另一個特徵是在身體中線的兩邊有一對骨節，接近頭盾的末端。

name: Anchiornis
description: Anchiornis is a genus of small, four-winged paravian dinosaurs, with only one known species, the type species Anchiornis huxleyi, named for its similarity to modern birds. The Latin name Anchiornis derives from a Greek word meaning "near bird", and huxleyi refers to Thomas Henry Huxley, a contemporary of Charles Darwin. Anchiornis fossils have been found only in the Tiaojishan Formation of Liaoning, China, in rocks dated to the Late Jurassic, about 160 million years ago. It is known from hundred
descriptionZh: 近鳥龍屬 又名近鳥，是種小型有羽毛恐龍，屬於手盜龍類的近鳥龍科。化石發現於中國遼寧省，生存年代屬於侏羅紀晚期，是有羽毛獸腳亞目恐龍。

name: Anchisauripus
description: Grallator is an ichnogenus which covers a common type of small, three-toed print made by a variety of bipedal theropod dinosaurs. Grallator-type footprints have been found in formations dating from the Early Triassic through to the early Cretaceous periods. They are found in the United States, Canada, Europe, India, Australia, Brazil and China, but are most abundant on the east coast of North America, especially the Triassic and Early Jurassic formations of the northern part of the Newark Superg
descriptionZh: Anchisauripus是一种生活在三叠纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Anchisaurus
description: Anchisaurus is a genus of basal sauropodomorph dinosaur. It lived during the Early Jurassic Period, and its fossils have been found in the red sandstone of the Upper Portland Formation, Northeastern United States, which was deposited from the Hettangian age into the Sinemurian age, between about 200 and 192 million years ago. Until recently it was classed as a member of Prosauropoda. The genus name Anchisaurus comes from the Greek αγχι anchi-; "near, close" + Greek σαυρος ; "lizard". Anchisaurus
descriptionZh: 近蜥龍屬（屬名Anchisaurus）又譯安琪龍，是近蜥龙类恐龍的一個屬，生存於侏儸紀早期，約2億到1億9500萬年前。近蜥龍過去曾被歸類於原蜥腳下目。近蜥龍的名稱是代替原先所定的名稱「Amphisaurus」及「Megadactylus」，這兩個名稱都已被其他動物所使用。屬名是由希臘文的「接近」及「蜥蜴」結合而成，是根據馬什的說法，他認為近蜥龍是一種較原始的恐龍 與進階型恐龍的過渡型動物。

name: Andesaurus
description: Andesaurus is a genus of basal titanosaurian sauropod dinosaur which existed during the middle of the Cretaceous Period in South America. Like most sauropods, it would have had a small head on the end of a long neck and an equally long tail.
descriptionZh: 安第斯龍屬 是原始泰坦巨龍類恐龍的一個屬，生存於白堊紀的南美洲。牠有著小型頭部與長頸部，及長度相近的尾巴。就如牠的其他近親，安第斯龍是一種非常大型的蜥腳下目恐龍。

name: Andhrasaurus
description: This list of informally named dinosaurs is a listing of dinosaurs that have never been given formally published scientific names. This list only includes names that were not properly published and have not since been published under a valid name. The following types of names are present on this list:Nomen nudum, Latin for "naked name": A name that has appeared in print but has not yet been formally published by the standards of the International Commission on Zoological Nomenclature. Nomina nuda
descriptionZh: Andhrasaurus是一种生活在侏罗纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Angaturama
description: Irritator is a genus of spinosaurid dinosaur that lived in what is now Brazil during the Albian stage of the Early Cretaceous Period, about 113 to 110 million years ago. It is known from a nearly complete skull found in the Romualdo Formation of the Araripe Basin. Fossil dealers had acquired this skull and sold it to the State Museum of Natural History Stuttgart. In 1996, the specimen became the holotype of the type species Irritator challengeri. The genus name comes from the word "irritation",
descriptionZh: 崇高龍屬 是獸腳亞目棘龍科下的一個屬，生活於下白堊紀的巴西。牠的模式標本是於巴西東北部的桑塔納組中的石灰岩被發現，是一個不完整的頭顱骨前段。模式種利瑪氏崇高龍 是由亞歷山大·克爾納 及坎普斯 於1996年2月所描述、命名的。屬名是以巴西原住民圖皮族的守護神「Angaturama」來命名；種名則是紀念古生物學家Murilo R. de Lima，他在1991年告知凱爾勒這個新的化石。

name: Angelinornis
description: Angelinornis was a herbivore dinosaur that lived during the Cretaceous period.
descriptionZh: Angelinornis是一种生活在白垩纪的草食性恐龙。

name: Angolatitan
description: Angolatitan is a genus of titanosauriform sauropod dinosaur from the Upper Cretaceous. It is also the first non-avian dinosaur discovered in Angola.
